Karachi Rocked by Blasts and Gunfire After Attack Near Rangers HQ, Multiple Casualties Feared
description: A suspected suicide bombing near the Sindh Rangers headquarters in Karachi led to multiple explosions and prolonged gunfire, resulting in a significant security operation.
content: Pakistan's financial hub Karachi was rocked by explosions and gunfire late on Saturday with attackers targeting Sindh Rangers headquarters, prompting a major security operation in the city. According to initial reports from Pakistan, a suicide bomber detonated explosives near the Rangers compound while other suspected attackers opened fire on security personnel, leading to an intense gun battle that reportedly lasted for nearly 30 minutes.Sindh Inspector General Javed Alam Odho said that at least six people have died following the attacks, including three gunmen and three rangers. Sources and local reports stated that the powerful initial explosion was followed by two smaller blasts, with heavy gunfire echoing across the area as security forces responded to the attack.The incident occurred in Karachi's Gulistan i Jauhar neighbourhood on a major road that connects several universities and provides access to the Pakistan Meteorological Department.Police, Rangers and rescue teams rushed to the scene after receiving reports of explosions and gunfire. Authorities quickly cordoned off the area as security personnel launched a clearance operation to secure the neighbourhood and search for any remaining attackers.The exact cause of the explosions, the number of casualties and the identity of those behind the attack have not yet been officially confirmed.Videos circulating on social media showed a heavy deployment of police and emergency responders around the site, while intermittent gunfire could reportedly be heard during the operation.Sindh Chief Minister Syed Murad Ali Shah has sought a detailed report on the incident from security officials as investigations continue.Authorities have urged the public to avoid the area while the operation remains underway. More details are expected as officials assess the situation.

title: AI digital: ପ୍ରଯୁକ୍ତି ଓ ଏଆଇକୁ ସୁଯୋଗ ଭାବେ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବା ଉଚିତ: ଉପରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତି
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ: ଉପରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତି ସି.ପି.ରାଧାକୃଷ୍ଣନ୍‌ ଶନିବାର ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀର ଡ. ଆମ୍ବେଦକର୍‌ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରଠାରେ ଅନୁଷ୍ଠିତ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ଏମ୍‌ଏସ୍‌ଏମ୍‌ଇ ଦିବସ ୨୦୨୬ ପାଳନ ସମାରୋହରେ ଯୋଗ ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ଏହି ଅବସରରେ ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ଲୋକମାନଙ୍କୁ ସମ୍ବୋଧିତ କରି ସେ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ, ଲଘୁ, କ୍ଷୁଦ୍ର ଓ ମଧ୍ୟମ ଉଦ୍ୟୋଗ (ଏମ୍‌ଏସ୍‌ଏମ୍‌ଇ) କେବଳ ଏକ ଅର୍ଥନୈତିକ ବର୍ଗ ନୁହେଁ, ବରଂ ଏହା ପ୍ରଥମ ପିଢ଼ିର ଉଦ୍ୟୋଗୀମାନଙ୍କ ସାହସ, ଯୁବପିଢ଼ିଙ୍କ ଆକାଂକ୍ଷା, ମହିଳା ଉଦ୍ୟୋଗୀମାନଙ୍କ ଦୃଢ଼ ସଂକଳ୍ପ ଏବଂ ଆହ୍ୱାନକୁ ସୁଯୋଗରେ ପରିଣତ କରିଥିବା କୋଟି କୋଟି କ୍ଷୁଦ୍ର ବ୍ୟବସାୟର ସାମର୍ଥ୍ୟକୁ ପ୍ରତିଫଳିତ କରେ । 'ବିକଶିତ ଭାରତ @୨୦୪୭' ଆଡ଼କୁ ଭାରତର ଯାତ୍ରା ଏକ ସମୃଦ୍ଧ ଏବଂ ଗତିଶୀଳ ଏମଏସଏମଇ କ୍ଷେତ୍ର ଦ୍ୱାରା ହିଁ ଚାଳିତ ହେବ ବୋଲି ସେ କହିଥିଲେ।
ନିଜର ଉଦ୍ୟୋଗୀ ଯାତ୍ରାର ଅଭିଜ୍ଞତା ବାଣ୍ଟି ଉପରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତି କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ, ସ୍ନାତକ ସମାପ୍ତ କରିବା ପରେ ସେ ନିଜ ପିତାଙ୍କ ଆର୍ଥିକ ସହାୟତାରେ ଏକ ଛୋଟ ପୋଷାକ ବ୍ୟବସାୟ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଥିଲେ। ପ୍ରାରମ୍ଭିକ ବର୍ଷଗୁଡ଼ିକର ପ୍ରତିବନ୍ଧକଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ମନେ ପକାଇ ସେ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ, ଜନସେବାରେ ପ୍ରବେଶ କରିବା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଅଧ୍ୟବସାୟ, ନିରନ୍ତର ଶିକ୍ଷା ଏବଂ କଠିନ ପରିଶ୍ରମ ହିଁ ତାଙ୍କୁ ଏକ ଅଗ୍ରଣୀ ଓ ଗୁଣାତ୍ମକ ପୋଷାକ ରପ୍ତାନି ବ୍ୟବସାୟ ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠା କରିବାରେ ସକ୍ଷମ କରିଥିଲା। ସେ ଯୁବ ଉଦ୍ୟୋଗୀମାନଙ୍କୁ ପ୍ରାରମ୍ଭିକ ଆସୁଥିବା ପ୍ରତିବନ୍ଧକଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ନେଇ ନିରାଶ ନହେବାକୁ ଏବଂ ନିଜ ବ୍ୟବସାୟର କୌଶଳ ଶିଖିବା ପାଇଁ ନିଜକୁ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ରୂପେ ଉତ୍ସର୍ଗ କରିବାକୁ ଆହ୍ୱାନ ଦେଇଥିଲେ।
କଏର ବୋର୍ଡର ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଭାବେ ନିଜର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକାଳକୁ ମନେ ପକାଇ ଶ୍ରୀ ରାଧାକ୍ରିଷ୍ଣନ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ, ଏହି କ୍ଷେତ୍ର ବିଷୟରେ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ତାଙ୍କର ବିଶେଷ ଜ୍ଞାନ ନଥିଲା, କିନ୍ତୁ ଏହାର ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ଦିଗକୁ ବୁଝିବାରେ ନିଜକୁ ସେ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ନିୟୋଜିତ କରିଥିଲେ। ରପ୍ତାନିକାରୀମାନଙ୍କ ସହ ଘନିଷ୍ଠ ଭାବେ ମିଶି କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ କରିବା ଏବଂ ବଡ଼ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ ଧାର୍ଯ୍ୟ କରିବା ଦ୍ୱାରା ଏହି କ୍ଷେତ୍ର ଉଲ୍ଲେଖନୀୟ ଅଭିବୃଦ୍ଧି ହାସଲ କରିପାରିଥିଲା। ସେ କହିଛନ୍ତି, "ଯଦି ଆପଣ କିଛି ହାସଲ କରିବାକୁ ସ୍ଥିର କରନ୍ତି, କଠିନ ପରିଶ୍ରମ କରନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ନିଜ କ୍ଷେତ୍ର ବିଷୟରେ ସବୁକିଛି ଶିଖନ୍ତି, ତେବେ ସଫଳତା ନିଶ୍ଚିତ ଭାବେ ମିଳିପାରିବ।
ଗୁଣବତ୍ତାର ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱ ଉପରେ ଜୋର ଦେଇ ଉପରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତି କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ ଗୁଣବତ୍ତାର ମାନଦଣ୍ଡ ସହିତ କୌଣସି ଆପୋଷ ବୁଝାମଣା କରାଯାଇପାରିବ ନାହିଁ। ଉତ୍ପାଦନ ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚ କମାଇବାକୁ ଯାଇ କେବେ ବି ଗୁଣବତ୍ତାକୁ ହ୍ରାସ କରାଯିବା ଉଚିତ ନୁହେଁ। ସେ କହିଥିଲେ, ‘ପ୍ରତିଦ୍ବନ୍ଦ୍ବୀମାନଙ୍କ ତୁଳନାରେ ଉତ୍କୃଷ୍ଟ ଗୁଣବତ୍ତା ଏବଂ ଉତ୍ତମ ସେବା ବଜାୟ ରଖିବା ସହିତ ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚ କମାଇବା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ହିଁ ପ୍ରକୃତ ସଫଳତା ନିହିତ ଥାଏ। କ୍ରମବର୍ଦ୍ଧିଷ୍ଣୁ ପ୍ରତିଯୋଗିତାମୂଳକ ବିଶ୍ୱ ବଜାରରେ ବ୍ୟବସାୟକୁ ତିଷ୍ଠି ରଖିବା ପାଇଁ ଗୁଣବତ୍ତା ହିଁ ଏକମାତ୍ର ଚାବିକାଠି’।
OpenAI: ପ୍ରଭଜିତ ସିଂହ ଓପନଏଆଇ ଭାରତ ମୁଖ୍ୟ
ଉପରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତି କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ଲଘୁ ଉଦ୍ୟୋଗ ଏକ କ୍ଷୁଦ୍ର ଉଦ୍ୟୋଗରେ ଏବଂ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ କ୍ଷୁଦ୍ର ଉଦ୍ୟୋଗ ଏକ ମଧ୍ୟମ ଉଦ୍ୟୋଗରେ ପରିଣତ ହେବା ହେବା ପାଇଁ ଆକାଂକ୍ଷା ରଖିବା ଉଚିତ। କୁଟୀର ଶିଳ୍ପରେ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରୁଥିବା ଉଦ୍ୟୋଗୀମାନେ ସବୁବେଳେ ସେହି ସ୍ତରରେ ରହିଯିବା ଉଚିତ ନୁହେଁ। ଏହି ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନକୁ ସୁଗମ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ସେ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାପ୍ତ ନିବେଶ, ନୀତିଗତ ସମର୍ଥନ ଏବଂ ସହଜ ପାଣ୍ଠି ଉପଲବ୍ଧତା ଉପରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱାରୋପ କରିଥିଲେ।
ଉପରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତି ସୂକ୍ଷ୍ମ, କ୍ଷୁଦ୍ର ଏବଂ ମଧ୍ୟମ ଉଦ୍ୟୋଗ ମନ୍ତ୍ରଣାଳୟକୁ ଏମଏସଏମଇଗୁଡ଼ିକର ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ପଞ୍ଜୀକରଣକୁ ଉତ୍ସାହିତ କରିବାକୁ ଅନୁରୋଧ କରିଥିଲେ। ସେ ଉଲ୍ଲେଖ କରିଥିଲେ ଯେ ଉନ୍ନତ ପଞ୍ଜୀକରଣ ତଥ୍ୟ ଗୁଣବତ୍ତା ବୃଦ୍ଧି କରିବ ଏବଂ ଏହି କ୍ଷେତ୍ରର ପ୍ରକୃତ ଆବଶ୍ୟକତା ଉପରେ ଆଧାରିତ ଅଧିକ ପ୍ରଭାବୀ ନୀତି ପ୍ରଣୟନକୁ ସକ୍ଷମ କରିବ। ଏହି ବର୍ଷର ଜାତିସଂଘର ବିଷୟ ‘ଏଆଇ-ଚାଳିତ ଭବିଷ୍ୟତରେ ମାନବ-କେନ୍ଦ୍ରିକ ଉଦ୍ୟୋଗିତା’ ଉପରେ ଉଲ୍ଲେଖ କରି ଉପରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତି କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ, ପ୍ରଯୁକ୍ତିବିଦ୍ୟାର ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନକୁ ଭୟ କରିବା ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ ତାହାକୁ ଏକ ସୁଯୋଗ ଭାବରେ ଦେଖାଯିବା ଉଚିତ। କମ୍ପ୍ୟୁଟର ପ୍ରଚଳନ ସମୟରେ ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇଥିବା ଆଶଙ୍କାକୁ ମନେ ପକାଇ ସେ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ, ଏହି ପ୍ରଯୁକ୍ତିବିଦ୍ୟା ଶେଷରେ ନୂତନ ନିଯୁକ୍ତି ସୁଯୋଗ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିଥିଲା। ସେ ଆଶା ପ୍ରକଟ କରିଥିଲେ ଯେ, ଯଦି କୃତ୍ରିମ ବୁଦ୍ଧିମତ୍ତାକୁ ଗଠନମୂଳକ ଭାବେ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରାଯାଏ, ତେବେ ଏହା ମଧ୍ୟ ସମାନ ଭାବରେ ବିକାଶର ନୂଆ ମାର୍ଗ ଖୋଲିବ।
ଖଦୀ ଏବଂ ଗ୍ରାମୋଦ୍ୟୋଗ କମିସନର ଅବଦାନକୁ ପ୍ରଶଂସା କରି ଶ୍ରୀ ରାଧାକ୍ରିଷ୍ଣନ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ, ଏହି ସଂଗଠନ ମହୁ ଉତ୍ପାଦନ ଏବଂ ଖଦୀ ପୋଷାକ ଭଳି କ୍ଷେତ୍ରରେ ଏକ ଉଲ୍ଲେଖନୀୟ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ ଆଣିପାରିଛି। ତେବେ, ଖଦୀ ଗାନ୍ଧିବାଦୀ ଆଦର୍ଶରୁ ପ୍ରେରଣା ଗ୍ରହଣ କରୁଥିବା ବେଳେ, ବିଶ୍ୱସ୍ତରରେ ପ୍ରତିଯୋଗିତାମୂଳକ ହୋଇ ରହିବା ପାଇଁ ଗ୍ରାହକଙ୍କ ବଦଳୁଥିବା ପସନ୍ଦ ଏବଂ ପ୍ରଯୁକ୍ତିବିଦ୍ୟାର ଅଗ୍ରଗତି ସହିତ ଏହାକୁ ନିରନ୍ତର ଖାପ ଖୁଆଇ ଚଳିବାକୁ ହେବ ବୋଲି ସେ କହିଥିଲେ।
ଏହି ଅବସରରେ ଉପରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତି 'ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରୀୟ କ୍ଷୁଦ୍ର ଶିଳ୍ପ ନିଗମ'କୁ ସେଡ୍ୟୁଲ୍ 'ଏ' କମ୍ପାନୀର ମାନ୍ୟତା ମିଳିଥିବାରୁ ସମ୍ବର୍ଦ୍ଧିତ କରିଥିଲେ। ଏଥିସହିତ ସେ ପିଏମଇଜିପି ୨.୦ ପୋର୍ଟାଲ, ସମାଧାନ ୨.୦ ପୋର୍ଟାଲ, କ୍ରୟ ଏବଂ ବିପଣନ ସହାୟତା ୨.୦ ପୋର୍ଟାଲ, ଏମଏସଏମଇ ଗ୍ଲୋବାଲ୍ ମାର୍ଟ ୨.୦ ପୋର୍ଟାଲ, ଟେଷ୍ଟିଂ ସେଣ୍ଟର ପୋର୍ଟାଲ ଏବଂ ଏମଏସଏମଇ ମନ୍ତ୍ରଣାଳୟର ବହୁଭାଷୀ ସହାୟତା ପଦକ୍ଷେପର ଶୁଭାରମ୍ଭ କରିଥିଲେ। ଏହାଛଡ଼ା 'ଏମଏସଏମଇ ଆଇଡିଆ ହାକାଥନ୍ ୬.୦’ ର ମଧ୍ୟ ଶୁଭାରମ୍ଭ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ଉପରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତି ଆତ୍ମନିର୍ଭର ଭାରତ ପାଣ୍ଠି ଏବଂ ପିଏମ୍ ବିଶ୍ୱକର୍ମା ଯୋଜନା ଉପରେ ଇ-ବୁକ୍ ଉନ୍ମୋଚନ କରିବା ସହ ଖଦୀ ଏବଂ ଗ୍ରାମୋଦ୍ୟୋଗ ଆୟୋଗର ନୂତନ ଉତ୍ପାଦଗୁଡ଼ିକର ବଜାର ପ୍ରବେଶ କରାଇଥିଲେ।

title: Dr. Farooq Calls For United War On Drug Abuse
description:
Srinagar, June, 27 : On the occasion of the International Day Against Drug Abuse and Illicit Trafficking, Jammu and Kashmir National Conference President Dr. Farooq Abdullah called for a united and sustained societal movement against the growing menace of drug abuse, saying the battle cannot be won by the government alone.
Dr. Farooq said that tackling substance abuse is a collective responsibility that demands the active participation of families, educational institutions, religious leaders, civil society organisations, healthcare professionals and the youth themselves.
"The fight against drugs is not the sole prerogative of the government. Every section of society has to come forward to protect our younger generation and reclaim their future. If we fail to act collectively today, we risk losing an entire generation to this deadly menace," he said.
He stressed that while stringent action against drug traffickers is essential, equal emphasis must be placed on prevention, awareness, counselling, rehabilitation and creating opportunities for young people.
"The stigma surrounding addiction must end. Those battling addiction need compassion, medical care and rehabilitation, while those involved in peddling narcotics must face the full force of the law," he added.
Dr. Farooq  urged parents to remain vigilant, teachers to identify early warning signs and community leaders to spread awareness against substance abuse. He also appealed to the youth to stay away from drugs and channel their energy towards education, sports, innovation and nation-building.
Reaffirming the National Conference's commitment to safeguarding the future of Jammu and Kashmir's youth, Dr. Farooq said that only a united society can defeat the drug menace and build a healthier, stronger and more prosperous Jammu and Kashmir for generations to come.

title: ‘House of Criticism’ Review: A Pensive and Touching Portrait of Married Art Critics Jerry Saltz and Roberta Smith (It Is Only, at Moments, a True-Life Christopher Guest Movie)
description: The way art connects (and saves) these two on a daily basis is its own idiosyncratic story, and it speaks to a certain vanishing culture of passionate New York literary brainiacs that used to be thought of as practically the essence of the city.

title: ഇറ്റലിയിൽ പൊലീസ് കസ്റ്റഡിയിൽ ഇന്ത്യാക്കാരൻ ദുരൂഹ സാഹചര്യത്തിൽ മരിച്ചു; വ്യാജപരാതിയിൽ പിടികൂടിയതെന്ന് കുടുംബം
description: ഇറ്റലിയിൽ പോലീസ് കസ്റ്റഡിയിലായിരുന്ന 23 വയസുകാരനായ പഞ്ചാബി യുവാവ് സുഖ്‌വിന്ദർ സിംഗ് ദുരൂഹ സാഹചര്യത്തിൽ മരിച്ചു. വാട്ടർ പാർക്കിൽ വെച്ച് മോശമായി പെരുമാറിയെന്ന പരാതിയിലായിരുന്നു അറസ്റ്റ്. എന്നാൽ മകൻ നിരപരാധിയാണെന്നും മരണത്തിൽ സുതാര്യമായ അന്വേഷണം വേണമെന്നും കുടുംബം ആവശ്യപ്പെടുന്നു.
content: <p>ചണ്ഡീഗഢ്: ഇറ്റലിയിൽ പോലീസ് കസ്റ്റഡിയിലായിരുന്ന 23 വയസുകാരനായ പഞ്ചാബി യുവാവ് ദുരൂഹ സാഹചര്യത്തിൽ മരിച്ചു. പഞ്ചാബിലെ ഹോഷിയാർപൂർ മിയാനി ഗ്രാമ സ്വദേശിയായ സുഖ്‌വിന്ദർ സിംഗ് എന്ന സോനുവാണ് മരിച്ചത്. മരണത്തെക്കുറിച്ച് ഇറ്റാലിയൻ അധികൃതർ സമഗ്രമായ അന്വേഷണത്തിന് ഉത്തരവിട്ടിട്ടുണ്ട്. കഴിഞ്ഞ ജൂൺ 21-നാണ് മൂന്ന് പ്രായപൂർത്തിയാകാത്ത പെൺകുട്ടികളുടെ പരാതിയെ തുടർന്ന് ഇറ്റാലിയൻ പോലീസ് സുഖ്‌വിന്ദറിനെ അറസ്റ്റ് ചെയ്തത്. ഒരു വാട്ടർ തീം പാർക്കിൽ വെച്ച് മോശമായി പെരുമാറിയെന്നായിരുന്നു പരാതി.</p><p>തുടർന്ന് കോടതിയിൽ ഹാജരാക്കിയ ഇയാളെ ജയിലിലേക്ക് മാറ്റി. അറസ്റ്റിലായി മൂന്നാം ദിവസമായ ജൂൺ 23-നാണ് യുവാവ് മരിച്ചത്. ജയിലിനുള്ളിൽ അസ്വസ്ഥത പ്രകടിപ്പിച്ചതിനെ തുടർന്ന് ഇയാളെ മറ്റൊരു സെല്ലിലേക്ക് മാറ്റിയിരുന്നു. എന്നാൽ പിന്നീട് മരിച്ച നിലയിൽ കണ്ടെത്തിയെന്നാണ് ലഭിക്കുന്ന വിവരം. ജൂൺ 24-നാണ് മരണ വിവരം കുടുംബത്തെ അറിയിച്ചത്. &nbsp;മകൻ നിരപരാധിയാണെന്ന് സുഖ്‌വിന്ദറിന്റെ കുടുംബം ഉറപ്പിച്ചുപറയുന്നു. പാർക്കിലൂടെ നടന്നുപോകുമ്പോൾ സെൽഫിയെടുക്കുകയായിരുന്ന പെൺകുട്ടികളുടെ ദേഹത്ത് അബദ്ധത്തിൽ കൈ തട്ടിയതാണെന്നും, തുടർന്നുണ്ടായ തർക്കമാണ് പരാതിയിൽ കലാശിച്ചതെന്നും സുഖ്‌വിന്ദർ ഫോണിലൂടെ അറിയിച്ചിരുന്നതായി കുടുംബം പറയുന്നു. ഇതുവരെ മൃതദേഹം കാണാൻ പോലും തങ്ങൾക്ക് സാധിച്ചിട്ടില്ലെന്നും മരണത്തിൽ സുതാര്യമായ അന്വേഷണം വേണമെന്നും കുടുംബം ആവശ്യപ്പെട്ടു.</p><p>മൃതദേഹം പോസ്റ്റ്‌മോർട്ടം ചെയ്യാൻ ഉത്തരവിട്ടിട്ടുണ്ട്. പ്രത്യേക അന്വേഷണ സമിതിയും രൂപീകരിച്ചു. കുടുംബത്തിന്റെ ഏക ആശ്രയമായിരുന്ന യുവാവാണ് മരണപ്പെട്ടത്. അഞ്ചര വർഷം മുൻപ് കുടുംബത്തിന്റെ കടബാധ്യതകൾ തീർക്കാനും സാമ്പത്തിക സ്ഥിതി മെച്ചപ്പെടുത്താനുമായി 15 ലക്ഷത്തോളം രൂപ വായ്പയെടുത്താണ് സുഖ്‌വിന്ദർ ഇറ്റലിയിലേക്ക് പോയത്. രണ്ട് വർഷം മുൻപ് അമ്മ മരിച്ചപ്പോൾ പോലും ഇമിഗ്രേഷൻ നടപടികൾ കാരണം നാട്ടിലെത്താൻ സുഖ്‌വിന്ദറിന് കഴിഞ്ഞിരുന്നില്ല. യുവാവിന്റെ വിയോഗം കടുത്ത ആഘാതത്തിലാണ് ഈ കുടുംബത്തെ എത്തിച്ചിരിക്കുന്നത്.</p>

title: Caldecott Tunnel Fire: Car Blaze Forces Lane Closures on Eastbound SR-24
description: Motorists are being urged to avoid the area if possible, expect significant delays, and follow traffic control measures while emergency operations are underway.
content: A vehicle fire has prompted the closure of two eastbound bores of the Caldecott Tunnel on State Route 24, causing significant traffic disruption. Emergency crews are at the scene, with Bores 1 and 2 closed while firefighters respond to the incident. Authorities have also confirmed that the left bore of the eastbound tunnel remains shut as crews continue to tackle the fire.Motorists are being urged to avoid the area if possible, expect significant delays, and follow traffic control measures while emergency operations are underway.This is a Breaking Story and will be updated soon

title: Lock Upp 2 Confirmed Contestants List: Sunita Ahuja, Akanksha Chamola, Ram Kapoor, Harshad Chopda And More
description: Lock Upp 2 kickstarted on Netflix with a grand premiere episode on June 27. Sunita Ahuja, Akanksha Chamola, Ram Kapoor, Harshad Chopda and others participated in the show as contestants.
content: After a long wait, Ekta Kapoor-produced reality show Lock Upp – Sach Ya Sazaa aka Lock Upp season 2, has finally kickstarted on Netflix with a grand premiere episode. The show has 15 dynamic contestants, who will do everything to survive the six-week-long game of patience, survival and struggles. Hosted by Farah Khan and Riteish Deshmukh, Lock Upp 2 will stream on the OTT platform Saturday to Wednesday at 8 pm. Ever since the show was announced, netizens have been curious to know who will enter the jail for six weeks. Since the premiere episode is out, let’s have a look at 15 contestants of Lock Upp 2.Sunita Ahuja   Sunita Ahuja is the wife of Bollywood superstar Govinda. She is known for her outspoken nature and controversial claims about her marital life with the actor. Sunita is also seen in Maa Hai Na with her daughter, Tina Ahuja. In Lock Upp 2, she is expected to unveil more secrets about her bond with Govinda.Ram Kapoor   Ram Kapoor is one of the biggest superstars on Indian television. He has acted in several TV shows like Ghar Ek Mandir, Bade Achhe Lagte Hain, Kasamh Se and so on. He was in the news for his rift with Ekta Kapoor. After featuring in several Bollywood films and TV shows, the actor is participating in Lock Upp 2 as a contestant.Akanksha Chamola   Akanksha Chamola is a famous actress in TV and web series. She is the wife of TV superstar Gaurav Khanna, who has also won Bigg Boss 19 earlier this year. At the grand premiere of Lock Upp 2, Akanksha revealed that she and Gaurav are heading for divorce after living separately for the past one year. The actress revealed that they are getting divorced due to compatibility issues.Harshad Chopda   Indian television’s handsome hunk Harshad Chopda has also participated in Lock Upp 2 as a contestant. Harshad stays away from the limelight. At the grand premiere, he revealed the biggest secret of his life. The actor is looking forward to opening up more about his personal life and showing a different side of his personality to the world.Shivangi Joshi   The Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai fame Shivangi Joshi is all set to show her personality on Lock Upp 2. She is considered as the ‘boring’ person on the show. However, the actress confessed that she is not ‘boring’ and would like to show a different side of her on the show. For the unversed, Shivangi has also acted in several TV shows, like Barsatein – Mausam Pyaar Ka, Balika Vadhu and so on.Dheeraj Dhoopar   Dheeraj Dhoopar is yet another famous TV actor who has participated in Lock Upp 2 as a contestant. He has acted in shows like Kundali Bhagya, Sasural Simar Ka, Naagin, Sherdil Shergill and so on. In Lock Upp 2, Dheeraj will share a cell with Ram Kapoor.Shreya Kalra   Shreya Kalra is a social media influencer from Indore, Madhya Pradesh. She has also earlier participated in Roadies as a contestant. She has acted in web series like Heartbeats – Pyaar Aur Armaan, Fuh Se Fantasy and so on.Sufi Motiwala   Sufi Motiwala is a content creator and fashion commentator. He had earlier participated in Karan Johar’s The Traitors Season 1. Sufi often gives honest opinions on several things. He will be sharing the cell with Ashneer Grover’s wife, Madhuri Grover.Varun Yadav   Varun Yadav is a Haryana-based YouTuber who is popularly known as Laila on social media. He is a best friend of Aarush Bhola, who had participated in Rise And Fall. His entry turned out to be a surprise one for all the viewers.Yogesh Rawat   Yogesh Rawat is a popular name in the world of reality shows. After participating in Roadies Double Cross and Splitsvilla 16, the handsome hunk will try his luck in Lock Upp – Sach Ya Sazaa. His fans are excited to see his equation with Akanksha Chaudhary on the Ekta Kapoor-produced show.Akanksha Chaudhary   Akanksha Chaudhary is yet another contestant from Splitsvilla 16 who had bonded well with Yogesh Rawat on the show. They are not together anymore. But her participation in Lock Upp 2 has widened the eyes of viewers since she will be playing the game with Yogesh.Pamala Serena   Entrepreneur-actress Pamala Serena has participated in Lock Upp 2 as a contestant. She was last seen in Desi Bling. On the show, she had massive arguments with Tejasswi Prakash. Now, it would be interesting to see how she will perform in the Riteish Deshmukh and Farah Khan-hosted show.Shresta Iyer   Shresta Iyer is a famous content creator on Instagram. She is the younger sister of Indian T20 cricket captain Shreyas Iyer. Shresta revealed that she wants to create her own identity. Hence, she has participated in Lock Upp 2 to show her true personality.Riyaz Aly   Riyaz Aly is a social media influencer who has participated in Lock Upp 2 as a contestant. He is known for collaborating with Orry, Farrhana Bhatt and other celebrities for reel videos on Instagram.Madhuri Grover   Madhuri Grover is the wife of Shark Tank India fame and BharatPe co-founder Ashneer Grover. She has stayed away from cameras for a long time. Now, she has decided to create her own identity by participating in Lock Upp.For the unversed, Lock Upp’s first season was hosted by Kangana Ranaut. It was won by Munawar Faruqui. Stay tuned for more updates!

title: Javid Dar Reaffirms Grassroots Development Push
description:
Baramulla, June 27: Minister for Agriculture Production, Rural Development and Panchayati Raj, Cooperatives and Election Department, Javid Ahmad Dar, on saturday  undertook an extensive tour of Rafiabad in Baramulla district, where he laid foundation stones and inaugurated several key developmental projects aimed at strengthening the public infrastructure and enhancing civic amenities in the area.
As part of the visit, the Minister laid the foundation stone for construction of a 1×30-metre RCC Plate Girder Bridge at Doabgah over Nallah Vijibal under the NABARD Rural Infrastructure Development Fund (RIDF). The bridge, to be executed by the Public Works (R&B) Department, will be constructed at an estimated cost of ₹629.41 lakh and is expected to significantly improve connectivity and facilitate safer movement for the local population.
The Minister also laid the foundation stone for strengthening and upgradation of 6 kilometres of inner link roads in Ladoora to be raised with an estimated cost of ₹507.24 lakh. The project would provide all-weather road connectivity and improve transportation facilities for the residents.
On the occasion, Javid Ahmad Dar inaugurated a Clock Tower at Rohama Chowk, dedicating the landmark project to the people of Rohama. He directed the concerned officers to install informative signboards highlighting the nearby tourist destinations to facilitate the visitors and promote tourism potential of the area.
The Minister further laid the foundation stone for construction of an additional accommodation block at Dak Bungalow, Chijhama.
Later, the Minister chaired a public outreach programme at Dak Bungalow, Chijhama, where he interacted with local residents and gave a patient hearing to their grievances and developmental demands. He assured the people that all genuine issues raised during the interaction would be examined and addressed in a phased and time-bound manner.
Addressing the gathering, Javid Ahmad Dar said that the government is committed to ensure equitable and inclusive development across Jammu and Kashmir by creating durable public assets and strengthening the basic infrastructure. He observed that several of the projects launched today were long-pending demands of the local people and would substantially improve their quality of life.
The Minister also stressed the importance of timely completion of all the sanctioned works while maintaining the highest standards of quality and transparency.
The Minister directed the executing agencies to strictly adhere to the prescribed timelines so that the benefits of these projects reach the people without delay.
Senior officers of the district administration, engineers from the executing departments, local representatives and locals were present on the occasion.

title: Youm-e-Ashoora : Mirwaiz Urges Youth to Embrace Faith and Service
description:
Srinagar, June 27,: Mirwaiz-e-Kashmir Molvi Mohammad Umar Farooq on Sunday urged the younger generation to reconnect with the enduring values of faith, character, service, simplicity and responsibility, saying these principles are essential for building a humane and principled society. 
Addressing a large gathering on the occasion of Youm-e-Ashoora at Astan-e-Aaliya Alam Sahib in Narwara, Srinagar, the Mirwaiz highlighted the timeless message of sacrifice, resilience and moral courage associated with the day.
Speaking on the significance of Youm-e-Ashoora, Mirwaiz said the day holds great importance in Islamic history and tradition, as many events associated with the lives of various Prophets of Allah are remembered on this day. He said it is a day of reflection, gratitude, repentance and renewal of faith.
Mirwaiz said Youm-e-Ashoora is also forever associated with the great sacrifice of Hazrat Imam Hussain (RA), the beloved grandson of Prophet Muhammad (SAW), and the martyrs of Karbala. He said Karbala is not merely a tragic event of history, but an eternal lesson in truth, justice, patience, sacrifice and steadfastness before oppression.
He said one of Ashoora's important messages for society today is to reflect on growing materialism and the weakening of moral and spiritual values. A society, he said, cannot be judged only by wealth, comfort or outward success, but by its commitment to truth, honesty, compassion, humility, family bonds, care for the poor and fear of Allah.
The gathering concluded with collective prayers for peace, unity, forgiveness, the well-being of the Ummah, and relief for all those facing suffering and hardship.

title: Bukhari Seeks Special Package for Old City
description:
Says decades of neglect have pushed Shehr-e-Khaas into decline
Srinagar, June 27: Apni Party president Syed Mohammad Altaf Bukhari on Sunday called for a comprehensive economic and housing package for the residents of Srinagar's old city, saying the historic downtown has suffered decades of neglect, resulting in widespread poverty, overcrowded housing and limited economic opportunities.
In a statement, Bukhari said many families in Shehr-e-Khaas continue to live in inadequate and overcrowded homes, with two or even three families often sharing a single house. He described the situation as a reflection of prolonged official neglect and inadequate urban development.
He also criticised the existing reservation system, claiming that most residents of the old city do not benefit from reserved categories except the Economically Weaker Sections (EWS), whose quota, he said, has been reduced from 10 per cent to 3 per cent. This, he added, has further diminished employment prospects for the youth.
Bukhari said unemployment, poor housing and limited economic opportunities have contributed to growing social challenges, including delayed marriages among young people. He urged the elected government to take up the issue with the Union Government and seek a special economic and housing package for the old city.
Highlighting the need for infrastructure upgrades, Bukhari pointed to recent waterlogging in several downtown areas following brief rainfall as evidence of the city's inadequate drainage system. He called for immediate investment in drainage, roads, public services and other civic infrastructure to improve living conditions for residents.

title: Speaker Rather Reviews development works in Budgam
description:
₹40 lakh approved for Shrine beautification works
Budgam, June 27: Speaker Jammu and Kashmir Legislative Assembly, Abdul Rahim Rather, on Saturday visited the revered Ziyarat of Sheikh Noor-ud-Din Noorani at Dreygam in Budgam district to review the ongoing and proposed development works and interact with the local residents.
During the visit, the Speaker listened to the public demands and grievances and assured them that all their genuine concerns would be addressed on priority.
Informing the gathering about the developmental initiatives, the Speaker said that works around ₹40 lakh have already been approved for development and beautification of the revered Shrine. He stated that the tenders have already been floated and the execution of these works will commence shortly.
The people also demanded construction of a protection wall to protect the Shrine and connectivity between the Eidgah park and the Shrine for easy access to the people.
Later, the Speaker visited Nallah Shaliganga, where the local residents highlighted the long-pending demand for construction of a bridge across the nallah at Reshweni-Tilwandaji near the playground to improve the connectivity.
Responding to the demand, Abdul Rahim Rather directed the concerned officers to prepare a Detailed Project Report (DPR) for the proposed bridge at the earliest.
The Speaker observed that the bridge would significantly enhance the connectivity, facilitate hassle free movement for the residents and benefit a large population living around and the adjoining areas.
The Speaker also visited Banderpora and Kremshore villages and interacted with the people there. He gave patient hearing to the delegations and assessed their problems. He assured them that their genuine grievances will be redressed at the earliest.
Reiterating his commitment to the welfare of the people, Abdul Rahim Rather assured the public that every genuine demand would be taken up for appropriate action and that sustained efforts would continue to ensure the overall development of the area.

title: Sakeena Urges Youth to Avail Skill Development Benefits
description:
Holds public darbar at Kulgam, dedicates Ambulance for patient care
Kulgam, June 27: Minister for Health and Medical Education, Social Welfare and Education, Sakeena Itoo, on saturday visited Sailkhanen village in Kulgam district and held a public darbar to directly engage with the people and listen to their grievances and developmental aspirations.
Addressing the gathering, the Minister said that the Omar Abdullah-led government is committed to people-centric governance and is making concerted efforts to fulfil the developmental aspirations of the people and ensure improved services at their doorsteps. She said that several projects of public importance have been initiated in recent months and healthcare facilities have been upgraded across Jammu and Kashmir, with particular focus on rural and far-flung areas.
The Minister also highlighted various welfare schemes aimed at different sections of society, especially women. She urged the youth to avail benefits of skill development initiatives. She stressed the importance of community participation in ensuring accountability and accelerating development.
During the public darbar, the locals projected several demands, including inclusion of the area on the tourism map, augmentation of drinking water supply and early completion of the Panchayat Ghar.
Responding to the demands, the Minister directed the concerned authorities to identify suitable land for a playfield. She dedicated an ambulance for patient care at the local hospital, considering the area's far-flung nature. She assured the public that all other genuine demands would be taken up and addressed in a phased and time-bound manner.

title: Louis Death Update: Chilling Video Sparks Outrage After 17-Year-Old Dies in Alleged Ambush
description: Five individuals have been arrested in connection with the death of a 17-year-old boy, Louis, following a premeditated attack at a construction site in Narbonne, France.
content: Five people have been arrested after a 17-year-old boy died following what French prosecutors described as a premeditated ambush at a construction site in the southern city of Narbonne. The victim, identified in French media as Louis, was found unconscious by construction workers around 14 hours after the attack last Friday. He died three days later in hospital in Perpignan. Authorities say the suspects were identified with the help of video footage allegedly recorded by the attackers during the assault. Speaking at a press conference, Prosecutor Jean-Philippe Rey said investigators believed the attack had been planned in advance. "The evidence gathered suggests that these extremely serious acts were premeditated and that the accused had set a trap for the victim by luring him into a construction site to beat him to death," he said. The suspects were initially charged with attempted murder. Prosecutors say those charges are expected to be upgraded following the victim's death, with the accused potentially facing life sentences if convicted. According to the regional newspaper L'Indépendant, police arrested five suspects, including two 19-year-olds and three minors. Investigators said they identified the suspects after reviewing graphic footage allegedly filmed during the attack. Authorities have not released details of the contents of the video. Reports say it shows multiple assailants attacking the victim before one of them poses beside him while he lies seriously injured. Narbonne Deputy Police Commissioner Ludovic Vinolas said the suspects had "few or no prior criminal records" and that some were not residents of the city. Investigators believe the suspects may have known the victim through the foster-care network in the Occitanie region, where Louis had reportedly been placed at his family's request. Police have not announced a motive for the attack. The killing has prompted widespread reaction on social media, where some users described the attackers as a "migrant gang" and claimed the victim had been targeted because he was white. French authorities have not commented on the suspects' citizenship, immigration status or ethnicity. Right-wing politician Marine Le Pen said the case reflected what she described as "everyday barbarity that can no longer be minimized, downplayed, or concealed." She added that a victory for her National Rally party in next year's presidential election would put an end to what she called "ideological blindness in the face of this savagery and this unbearable ultraviolence." The investigation into the killing is continuing.

title: Dan Sullivan vs Dan Sullivan: Judge Greenlights Unusual Alaska Senate Showdown
description: An Alaska judge ruled that Dan J. Sullivan can appear on the state's August primary ballot, overturning an elections official's decision to disqualify him for sharing the name and party of incumbent Senator Dan Sullivan. The ruling, which can still be appealed to the Alaska Supreme Court, adds further uncertainty to one of the nation's most competitive Senate races.
content: A legal fight over a confusingly familiar name just took a major turn in Alaska's upcoming Senate primary. A man who shares the same name and party affiliation as sitting Republican Senator Dan Sullivan will now appear on the August ballot after all, following a ruling from a state judge.According to a report from USA Today, Alaska Superior Court Judge Thomas Matthews ruled on Friday, June 26, that the state's Division of Elections had no legal basis to remove Dan J. Sullivan from the ballot.Why the Decision Got ReversedThis wasn't the first ruling on the matter. Just under two weeks earlier, on June 15, Division of Elections Director Carol Beecher had disqualified the Petersburg resident, arguing his candidacy seemed designed to confuse voters rather than serve as a genuine run for office.Judge Matthews saw it differently. He found that Beecher had relied on what he called a newly invented "good faith" standard, one that simply doesn't exist anywhere in the U.S. Constitution, Alaska law or the state's election regulations. As Matthews put it, "the decision was based upon a new, previously unstated, 'good-faith' criteria."Beyond the legal technicality, the judge also found that election officials hadn't actually proven their case. He concluded there wasn't enough evidence to support the claim that Sullivan entered the race purely to mislead voters.With that, Matthews ordered the Division of Elections to place Dan J. Sullivan on the August 18 Republican primary ballot. That said, the ruling isn't necessarily the final word. It can still be appealed to the Alaska Supreme Court.What Made Sullivan EligiblePart of the judge's reasoning came down to basic qualifications. Matthews determined that Dan J. Sullivan meets all the constitutional requirements needed to serve in the U.S. Senate, covering age, citizenship and residency. Because of that, the judge ruled that election officials had overstepped by adding an extra eligibility test that has no legal grounding.A Race Already Under National SpotlightThis isn't just a local quirk. Alaska's Senate race is already shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the entire country this fall, which is part of why this dispute has drawn so much outside attention.Senator Dan Sullivan has accused his namesake challenger of working alongside Democrats, including former U.S. Representative Mary Peltola's campaign, in an effort to confuse voters and boost her chances under Alaska's open primary and ranked choice voting system. Peltola, the challenger himself, and Alaska Democrats have all pushed back on those claims and denied any coordination.READ MORE: Trump Warns of 'Communist' Takeover of Democratic Party Ahead of MidtermsSullivan hasn't been alone in raising concerns either. The National Republican Senatorial Committee and the Alaska Republican Party both argued that the matching candidacy could mislead voters, especially given that both Republicans had requested similar ballot names.How Alaska's Voting System Plays Into the StakesAlaska's election rules add another layer of complexity here. Under the state's system, the top four finishers in the August 18 primary move on to the November general election, regardless of party.Before Beecher's original disqualification was overturned, election officials had actually come up with a plan to help voters tell the two candidates apart. The idea was to list the challenger as "Dan J. Sullivan" and the incumbent senator as "Dan S. Sullivan" on the primary ballot.

title: Public Outreach Bridges Governance Gaps: Javed Rana
description:
Holds public outreach camp in Mendhar, ; addresses public concerns
Mendhar, June 27: Minister for Jal Shakti, Forest, Ecology & Environment, and Tribal Affairs, Javed Ahmed Rana on Sunday held a public outreach meeting at Village Ari in Mendhar.
Addressing the gathering, the Minister highlighted the importance of such outreach programmes in strengthening the link between the administration and people at the grassroots level. He said these interactions help bridge gaps in governance and ensure that public concerns are effectively heard and addressed.
The meeting provided a platform for the local populace to voice their developmental concerns, pending grievances and demands directly before the Minister.
The residents raised a range of issues pertaining to local infrastructure, water supply, forest-related matters and other civic concerns, seeking speedy redress of the same.
Taking cognisance of the representations made by the people, the Minister directed the concerned officers present on the occasion to ensure prompt and effective resolution of the issues raised, with specific directions issued on the spot for matters requiring immediate attention.
He stated that such meetings are not merely a formality but a vital instrument of responsive and transparent governance, ensuring that the benefits of government schemes and developmental initiatives reach every household, particularly in remote and tribal areas.
"Public outreach programmes are the cornerstone of people-centric governance. It is our responsibility to ensure that every citizen, especially those in far-flung areas, has direct access to administration and that their grievances do not go unheard. The government led by Chief Minister Omar Abdullah is fully committed to take governance to the doorstep of every individual," said Minister Rana.
The Minister also reiterated the government's resolve to accelerate developmental activities in the Mendhar constituency. He assured the public of continued focus on addressing their long-standing concerns across all sectors under his charge.
Senior officers from the concerned departments were present during the meeting and were directed to submit action-taken reports on the grievances addressed during the programme.

title: Apni Party Seeks Unemployment Allowance for Youth
description:
Holds workers’ convention in Lolab 
Srinagar, June 27:-  Senior Apni Party leader and former Cabinet Minister Ghulam Hassan Mir on Saturday accused the ruling National Conference (NC) government of failing to fulfil its election promises and demanded unemployment allowances for jobless youth if it was unable to provide employment.
Addressing a party workers' convention in Lolab, Kupwara, Mir said the government's assurances of creating one lakh jobs, regularising daily wagers, providing 200 units of free electricity, free LPG cylinders and enhancing ration quotas had remained unfulfilled. He alleged that the promises were made solely to secure votes and claimed the government had failed to deliver effective governance.
Criticising the government's outsourcing of jobs, Mir said it reflected a lack of commitment towards addressing unemployment. He urged the administration to introduce unemployment allowances for youth until adequate job opportunities are created.
Mir also dismissed the ruling party's proposed sit-in protest in Delhi to seek restoration of statehood as a "political gimmick" and rejected the government's contention that the absence of statehood was preventing it from fulfilling its promises. He said governance should not come to a standstill because of the constitutional status of the Union Territory.
Highlighting Kupwara's tourism potential, Mir called for the development of the district's scenic destinations to boost the local economy and generate employment.
Speaking on the occasion, Apni Party Provincial President Mohammad Ashraf Mir urged party workers to strengthen their outreach and remain connected with people at the grassroots. He asked workers to highlight the party's agenda and ensure that voters are not misled by what he described as the false promises of traditional political parties in the forthcoming Urban Local Bodies and Panchayat elections.
Several senior party leaders, including Chief Coordinator and Returning Officer Abdul Majeed Padder, also attended the convention.

title: India Predicted XI For 2nd T20I Vs Ireland
description: India prepare for the second T20I vs Ireland as they aim to bounce back from their loss. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi may debut, potentially replacing Tilak Varma.
content: India started their new T20I journey under the brand new captain Shreyas Iyer on a pretty sour note as they were handed a shock defeat by Ireland in the first match of the two-game series in Belfast on June 26 (Friday). India will next face Ireland in the second and final game of the series on June 28 (Sunday), as they desperately need a win to save the series. The question on everyone's mind is whether Vaibhav Sooryavanshi will get his debut in that game, and if he does get his India call-up, who he will replace in the lineup.Vaibhav Sooryavanshi In, Tilak Varma OutIndia needs some firepower at the top and someone who could compliment Abhishek Sharma to land double hammer blows to the Irish fast bowlers, who were so good in the first T20I. That is where Vaibhav Sooryavanshi comes in. This means that Sanju Samson has to come down the order at no.3, something that he can easily do given his experience. Shreyas Iyer can come in at no.4, while Ishan Kishan can drop down to no.5, a position he has batted successfully in Jharkhand's victorious campaign in the Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy 2026. Shivam Dube and Axar Patel can come in at 6 and 7.This would mean that India have to drop their vice-captain Tilak Varma, who looked to struggle in his innings in the first T20I, where he could only manage to score 19 runs from 21 balls.Washington Sundar Out; Prince Yadav To DebutIndia should ideally drop Washington Sundar from the side in the second T20I vs Ireland. He scred just 9 runs in the bat, and bowled a single over where he was smashed for 19 runs. India should drop the idea of the extra all-rounder and go for a specialist spinner in Ravi Bishnoi. Harshit Rana has shown previously that he can hold himself with the bat, and hence he would be a good option for the no.8 spot.Prasidh Krishna had a horror show in the first T20I, giving away 57 runs from 4 overs. Instead of Krishna, India could go for Prince Yadav, who will be a handy option in what would be his T20I debut.India Predicted Playing XI For 2nd T20I Vs IrelandVaibhav Sooryavanshi, Abhishek Sharma, Sanju Samson (wk), Shreyas Iyer, Ishan Kishan, Shivam Dube, Axar Patel, Harshit Rana, Arshdeep Singh, Prince Yadav, Ravi BishnoiIndia Squad For T20I Series Vs IrelandShreyas Iyer (c), Abhishek Sharma, Sanju Samson, Ishan Kishan, Shivam Dube, Tilak Varma (vc), Suryansh Shegde, Axar Patel, Washington Sundar, Varun Chakravarthy, Ravi Bishnoi, Prasidh Krishna, Harshit Rana, Arshdeep Singh, Prince Yadav, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi.

title: Watch Kings Of Leon headline first ever State Fayre Festival: “It feels like coming home”
description:
The Tennessee band opened the festival of music and barbecue in Chelmsford last night (June 26)
The post Watch Kings Of Leon headline first ever State Fayre Festival: “It feels like coming home” appeared first on NME.
content:
Kings Of Leon have kicked off the inaugural State Fayre festival with a hits-packed headline set – watch footage below.

READ MORE: Kings Of Leon – ‘Can We Please Have Fun’ review: a return to their rugged roots… sort of

The Tennessee band topped the bill on the opening night of the new festival at Hylands Park in Chelmsford last night (June 26), following sets from The Black Crowes, Stephen Wilson Jr, Kingfishr and more.
State Fayre, which bills itself as the UK’s biggest music and barbecue festival, is taking place across the weekend and combines a rock, Americana and country-leaning line-up with American-inspired food, decor and fairground attractions.
With the festival opening during a record-breaking UK heatwave, and the smell of barbecue drifting across the site as the band took to the Main Stage, frontman Caleb Followill told the crowd “it feels like being home”.
Kings Of Leon opened with ‘Find Me’ before moving into fan favourites including ‘The Bucket’, ‘Fans’, ‘On Call’, ‘Use Somebody’, ‘Waste A Moment’, ‘Closer’, ‘Molly’s Chambers’, ‘Black Thumbnail’ and ‘Sex On Fire’.
Check out footage from the set here:



Kings Of Leon at State Fayre Festival. CREDIT: Matt Eachus The Manc Photographer
Kings Of Leon at State Fayre Festival. CREDIT: JCrispinPhoto
Kings Of Leon at State Fayre Festival. CREDIT: Matt Eachus The Manc Photographer
Kings Of Leon played:
‘Find Me’
‘The Bucket’
‘Fans’
‘On Call’
‘Revelry’
‘Manhattan’
‘Use Somebody’
‘Waste A Moment’
‘Wait For Me’
‘Split Screen’
‘The Immortals’
‘Supersoaker’
‘Closer’
‘Molly’s Chambers’
‘Razz’
‘My Party’
‘Birthday’
‘Back Down South’
‘Radioactive’
‘Pyro’
‘Knocked Up’
‘Black Thumbnail’ 
‘Sex On Fire’ 
The festival continues today (June 27) with a headline set from Alanis Morissette, who replaced Neil Young earlier this year after he cancelled his planned UK and European tour dates with The Chrome Hearts.
Skunk Anansie are also set to appear today, while The Lumineers will close the festival tomorrow (June 28). Other artists across the weekend include Elvis Costello & The Imposters with Charlie Sexton and Counting Crows.
Kings Of Leon, meanwhile, will continue their UK and Ireland dates next week, including shows in Belfast, Limerick, Glasgow, Manchester and Leeds. Find any remaining tickets here.
Kings Of Leon will play:
JUNE 
29 – Belfast, Ormeau Park
JULY 
1 – Limerick, Thomond Park
3 – Glasgow, Bellahouston Park
4 – Manchester, Co-op Live
6 – Leeds, First Direct Bank Arena
10 – Madrid, Mad Cool Festival
The band last released an album with ‘Can We Please Have Fun’ in 2024. In a three-star review, NME described the record as “easily KOL’s most promising, liberated record for over a decade”, while adding that it was “still surprisingly restrained in places”.
Speaking to NME around the album’s release, the band said they had rediscovered their sense of excitement while making the record.
“It was the most enjoyable record I’ve ever been a part of,” Caleb said, with drummer Nathan Followill adding: “It’s like we allowed ourselves to be musically vulnerable.”

title: Bharat Taxi ସହ ଯୋଡ଼ିଛନ୍ତି ୭ ଲକ୍ଷରୁ ଅଧିକ ସାରଥୀ
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ: କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଗୃହ ଏବଂ ସମବାୟ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଅମିତ ଶାହ ଶନିବାର ଗୁଜରାଟରେ ଗାନ୍ଧୀନଗରସ୍ଥିତ ମହାତ୍ମା ମନ୍ଦିର ସମ୍ମିଳନୀ ଏବଂ ପ୍ରଦର୍ଶନୀ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରରେ ସମବାୟ ଭିତ୍ତିକ ଗତିଶୀଳ ପ୍ଲାଟଫର୍ମ 'ଭାରତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସି’ର ଶୁଭାରମ୍ଭ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଭାରତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସିର ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ ହେଉଛି ନାଗରିକମାନଙ୍କୁ ଭରସାଯୋଗ୍ୟ ଏବଂ ସେବା ଭିତ୍ତିକ ପରିବହନ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିବା, ଯାହା ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସି, ଅଟୋ ଏବଂ ଦୁଇ ଚକିଆ ପରିବହନ ସେବାକୁ ମାଲିକାନା, ସମ୍ମାନ, ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଏବଂ ସମୃଦ୍ଧି ସହିତ ଯୋଡ଼ିଥାଏ। ଏହି କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମରେ ଗୁଜରାଟର ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଭୂପେନ୍ଦ୍ରଭାଇ ପଟେଲ, ଗୁଜରାଟର ଉପମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ହର୍ଷ ସଂଘବୀ, ଗୁଜରାଟର ସମବାୟ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ  ଜୀତୁଭାଇ ବାଘାନୀ, ଗୁଜରାଟର ସମବାୟ ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ରମେଶଭାଇ କଟାରା, ସମବାୟ ମନ୍ତ୍ରଣାଳୟର ସଚିବ ଡ. ଆଶିଷ କୁମାର ଭୁଟାନୀ, ଗୁଜରାଟର ମୁଖ୍ୟ ସଚିବ ମନୋଜ ଦାସ, ଭାରତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସିର ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଡ. ଜୟେନ ମେହେଟ୍ଟାଙ୍କ ସମେତ ସମବାୟ କ୍ଷେତ୍ରର ବରିଷ୍ଠ ପ୍ରତିନିଧି, ଅଧିକାରୀ ଏବଂ ବହୁ ସଂଖ୍ୟକ ସାରଥି ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ଥିଲେ।
ଏହି ଅବସରରେ ଉଦବୋଧନ ଦେଇ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ସମବାୟ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ, ଆଜି ଭାରତର ଗମନାଗମନ କ୍ଷେତ୍ର ପାଇଁ ଏକ ବଡ଼ ଦିନ। ସେ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ ଦେଶର ବିକାଶ ସହିତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସି ଏବଂ ପରିବହନ ସେବାର ଆବଶ୍ୟକତା ଘରେ ଘରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଛି ଏବଂ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସିର ଧାରଣା କେବଳ ଚାରି ଚକିଆ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ସୀମିତ ନାହିଁ, ବରଂ ଦୁଇ ଚକିଆ, ଅଟୋ ଏବଂ ଅନ୍ୟାନ୍ୟ ସହରାଞ୍ଚଳ ପରିବହନ ସେବା ମଧ୍ୟ ଏହାର ଏକ ଅଂଶବିଶେଷ ହୋଇପାରିଛି। ଗୁଜୁରାଟରେ 'ଭାରତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସି' ର ଶୁଭାରମ୍ଭ ସମବାୟ ସମିତି ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଏହି ବ୍ୟାପକ ଗତିଶୀଳତାର ଆବଶ୍ୟକତାକୁ ଏକ ନୂତନ ଦିଗ ଦେବା ପାଇଁ ଏକ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ।
Amit Shah: ଜୁଲାଇ ୪ରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଆସିବେ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଗୃହମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଅମିତ ଶାହ
ଶ୍ରୀ ଅମିତ ଶାହ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ ଅନ୍ୟ କମ୍ପାନୀମାନେ ଚାଳକମାନଙ୍କୁ ଡ୍ରାଇଭର ଭାବେ ବିବେଚନା କରନ୍ତି, କିନ୍ତୁ ଭାରତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସି ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ 'ସାରଥି ’ ଭାବେ ବିବେଚନା କରିଥାଏ। ସେ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ ଏହା କେବଳ ଶବ୍ଦର ପାର୍ଥକ୍ୟ ନୁହେଁ, ବରଂ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଚିନ୍ତାଧାରାର ପାର୍ଥକ୍ୟ। 'ସାରଥି' ମାନେ କେବଳ ସେବା ପ୍ରଦାନକାରୀ ନୁହନ୍ତି, ବରଂ ଏହି ସମବାୟର ସମ୍ମାନିତ ଅଂଶୀଦାର ଏବଂ 'ମାଲିକ' ଅଟନ୍ତି। ଭାରତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସିର ମୂଳ ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ ହେଉଛି ଉଭୟ ଡ୍ରାଇଭର ଏବଂ ଗ୍ରାହକଙ୍କ ଶୋଷଣକୁ ରୋକିବା, ସେବାର ଗୁଣବତ୍ତା ବୃଦ୍ଧି କରିବା ଏବଂ ଗତିଶୀଳତା କ୍ଷେତ୍ରରେ ଏକ ନ୍ୟାୟସଙ୍ଗତ ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥା ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠା କରିବା।
କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଗୃହମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ ବିଗତ ବର୍ଷଗୁଡ଼ିକରେ ଆପ୍ ଆଧାରିତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସି ସେବାକୁ ନେଇ ଅନେକ ଅଭିଯୋଗ ଆସିଛି, ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ଡ୍ରାଇଭରମାନଙ୍କ ରୋଜଗାରରୁ କିଛି ଅଧିକ କମିଶନ ନିଆଯାଉଛି, କିଛି ଦେୟ ଠିକ୍ ସମୟରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ପାରୁନାହିଁ, ଏବଂ କିଛି ପଞ୍ଜୀକରଣ ବିନା ଶୁଣାଣିରେ ବନ୍ଦ କରିଦିଆଯାଇଛି। ସେ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ସମସ୍ୟାର ସମାଧାନ କେବଳ ଆଇନ ଦ୍ୱାରା ନୁହେଁ, ବେଳେବେଳେ ସଠିକ୍ ସଂସ୍ଥାଗତ ମଡେଲ ଏକ ସ୍ଥାୟୀ ସମାଧାନ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିଥାଏ। ଏହି ଚିନ୍ତାଧାରା ସହିତ, ଭାରତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସିର ପରିକଳ୍ପନା ଏକ ସମବାୟ ମଡେଲରେ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା।

title: Aaj Ka Rashifal 28 June 2026: रविवार को इन राशियों को मिलेगा भाग्य का साथ, जानें मेष से मीन तक का भविष्यफल
description: Aaj Ka Rashifal 28 June 2026: जानिए कैसा रहेगा आपका रविवार का दिन। किसे मिलेगा आकस्मिक धन और कमोडिटी बाजार में किस समय व्यापार करने से होगा महालाभ, पढ़ें सटीक भविष्यफल।
content:
Aaj Ka Rashifal 28 June 2026: वैदिक ज्योतिष शास्त्र के सिद्धांतों के अनुसार, ग्रहों की बदलती चाल और नक्षत्रों का गोचर हमारे दैनिक जीवन को प्रत्यक्ष और अप्रत्यक्ष रूप से प्रभावित करता है।
आज रविवार, 28 जून 2026 का दिन कई राशि के जातकों के लिए नई उम्मीदें, बड़े अवसर और महत्वपूर्ण बदलाव लेकर आया है। आज शुद्ध ज्येष्ठ मास के शुक्ल पक्ष की चतुर्दशी तिथि है, और आज आकाश मंडल में ज्येष्ठा नक्षत्र का प्रभाव रहने वाला है।
ग्रहों की यह विशेष स्थिति कुछ राशियों के लिए जहाँ आकस्मिक धन लाभ, मान-सम्मान और सोचे हुए कार्यों में सफलता लेकर आ रही है, वहीं कुछ राशियों को जल्दबाजी में निर्णय लेने और शत्रुओं के द्वेष से बचने की आवश्यकता है। इसके साथ ही आज व्यापार जगत और कमोडिटी मार्केट में भी एक विशिष्ट समय अवधि के दौरान अद्भुत लाभ की स्थिति बनेगी। आइए विस्तार से जानते हैं आज का संपूर्ण राशिफल और व्यापारिक भविष्य।
मेष राशि (Aries)-रचनात्मक कार्यों में सफलता
मेष राशि के जातकों को आज अपने कार्यक्षेत्र में बेहद सजग और सचेत रहने की आवश्यकता है। आज दफ्तर या व्यापार स्थल पर बन रहे नए समीकरणों की अनदेखी करने से आप अपने सहयोगियों के बीच अकेले पड़ सकते हैं, इसलिए टीमवर्क पर ध्यान दें।
बौद्धिक और कलात्मक क्षेत्र से जुड़े लोगों के लिए आज का दिन शानदार रहेगा। आज आपको लेखन, सृजन एवं अन्य रचनात्मक कार्यों में बेहतरीन सफलता प्राप्त होगी। पूरे दिन आपका आत्मविश्वास मजबूत बना रहेगा, जिससे आपके कई महत्वपूर्ण और लाभकारी कार्य आसानी से बनते चले जाएंगे।
वृषभ राशि (Taurus)-बड़ी सामाजिक जिम्मेदारी
वृषभ राशि के जातकों के लिए आज का दिन सामाजिक और व्यावहारिक मोर्चे पर तरक्की लेकर आया है। आज सामाजिक जीवन में आपके प्रभाव को देखते हुए आपको कोई बहुत बड़ी और महत्वपूर्ण जिम्मेदारी सौंपी जा सकती है, जिससे आपका सम्मान बढ़ेगा।
आपके लिए आज की सबसे बड़ी सलाह यह है कि किसी भी काम को करने से पहले एक ठोस योजना बना लें और योजना बनाकर ही कार्य करें। आज आपके मन में लंबे समय से बना हुआ अज्ञात भय और चिंता पूरी तरह से दूर हो जाएगी, जिससे सोचे हुए कार्य सफलतापूर्वक समय पर पूरे होंगे।
मिथुन राशि (Gemini)-व्यापार में बड़ी सफलता
मिथुन राशि के जातकों को आज आर्थिक मामलों में अपनी आदतों पर थोड़ा नियंत्रण रखने की आवश्यकता है। आज भूलकर भी जल्दबाजी में आकर धन खर्च करने की कोई बड़ी योजना या निवेश न बनाएं, अन्यथा आपको बड़ी वित्तीय परेशानी का सामना करना पड़ सकता है।
व्यापार और व्यवसाय के मोर्चे पर आज का दिन अत्यंत भाग्यशाली रहने वाला है; आपको अपने बिजनेस में कोई बड़ी सफलता मिलेगी। इसके साथ ही आज आपका पारिवारिक जीवन पूरी तरह से आनंदमय और खुशहाल बना रहेगा, जिससे मन में संतोष की भावना रहेगी।
कर्क राशि (Cancer)-कीमती सामानों की सुरक्षा और धार्मिक आस्था
कर्क राशि के जातकों को आज व्यावहारिक और व्यक्तिगत जीवन में थोड़ी सावधानी बरतनी होगी। आज यात्रा के दौरान या घर से बाहर निकलते समय अपने कीमती सामान और महत्वपूर्ण दस्तावेजों को बहुत संभाल कर रखें, क्योंकि इनके खोने या चोरी होने की आशंका है।
आज आपकी धर्म-कर्म और आध्यात्मिक गतिविधियों में आस्था काफी ज्यादा बढ़ेगी, जिससे आप मानसिक शांति का अनुभव करेंगे। स्वास्थ्य के प्रति आज थोड़ी सतर्कता रखना आपके लिए बेहद वांछनीय और जरूरी है। सामाजिक मोर्चे पर आज आपकी लोकप्रियता में अच्छी वृद्धि देखने को मिलेगी।
सिंह राशि (Leo)-भाग्य और कर्म का अद्भुत संगम
सिंह राशि के जातकों के लिए रविवार का दिन प्रगति और पुरस्कार लेकर आया है। आज बदलते समय के रुख को पहचानते हुए यदि आप अपनी पुरानी योजनाओं में उचित बदलाव करेंगे, तो यह आपके लिए अत्यधिक लाभकारी और धन प्रदायक सिद्ध होगा।
आज आपकी धार्मिक कार्यों के प्रति रुचि काफी बढ़ी हुई रहेगी। ग्रहों के शुभ गोचर के कारण आज भाग्य एवं कर्म दोनों आपका भरपूर साथ देंगे, जिससे आपके सभी रुके काम पूरे होंगे। कार्यक्षेत्र या समाज में आज आपको किसी उत्कृष्ट कार्य के लिए पुरस्कार की प्राप्ति होने के प्रबल योग हैं।
कन्या राशि (Virgo)-सामूहिक कार्यों में सफलता
कन्या राशि के जातकों के लिए आज का दिन समाज और संगठन में अपनी स्थिति को मजबूत करने का है। आज सामूहिक कार्यों में सबको साथ लेकर चलने का आपका प्रयास पूरी तरह से सार्थक होगा, जिससे आपकी नेतृत्व क्षमता की सराहना की जाएगी।
आपके लिए आज की विशेष सलाह यह है कि भूलकर भी दूसरों के निजी मामलों या विवादों में दखल न दें। यदि आप आज कोई खरीदी-बिक्री (क्रय-विक्रय) का कार्य करने जा रहे हैं, तो उसमें पूरी सावधानी और दस्तावेज की जांच अवश्य रखें। समाज में आज आपको उत्तम मान-सम्मान की प्राप्ति होगी।
तुला राशि (Libra)-आकस्मिक धन लाभ के योग
तुला राशि के जातकों के लिए आज का दिन थोड़ा मिश्रित प्रभाव लेकर आएगा। मानसिक स्तर पर आज आप लोगों की अत्यधिक भीड़भाड़ वाले स्थानों में खुद को थोड़ा असहज और थका हुआ महसूस करेंगे, इसलिए एकांत में समय बिताना आपके लिए अच्छा रहेगा।
आर्थिक दृष्टिकोण से आज का दिन बेहद शानदार रहने वाला है। आज आपको कहीं से अचानक आकस्मिक धन की प्राप्ति हो सकती है। आज भविष्य की कुछ लाभदायक योजनाओं पर करीबियों के साथ विचार-विमर्श होगा। हालांकि, अपने प्रयासों को सफल बनाने के लिए काम में सावधानी रखना वांछनीय है।
वृश्चिक राशि (Scorpio)-नए कारोबारी सौदे
वृश्चिक राशि के जातकों के लिए आज का दिन व्यावसायिक उन्नति लेकर आया है। व्यापार के क्षेत्र में आज आपके कुछ नए और महत्वपूर्ण कारोबारी सौदे तय हो सकते हैं, जो आपके बिजनेस को आगे बढ़ाने में बेहद सहायक सिद्ध होंगे। कार्यस्थल पर आपके काम की जमकर प्रशंसा होगी।
आज आपके भीतर साहसिक क्षमता और जोखिम उठाने की प्रवृत्ति में अच्छी वृद्धि देखने को मिलेगी। हालांकि, आपको दफ्तर में थोड़ा संभलकर रहना होगा; कार्यक्षेत्र के उच्चाधिकारियों का आपके प्रति आंतरिक रूप से द्वेष और ईर्ष्या का भाव रह सकता है, इसलिए अपने काम से काम रखें।
धनु राशि (Sagittarius)-मांगलिक कार्यों में सफलता
धनु राशि के जातकों के लिए रविवार का दिन पारिवारिक खुशियाँ और मांगलिक अवसर लेकर आया है। जो लोग लंबे समय से विवाह योग्य हैं, उनके लिए आज शादी-विवाह की चर्चाओं में बड़ी सफलता मिलने के पूरे आसार दिखाई दे रहे हैं, जिससे घर में खुशी का माहौल रहेगा।
आज आपके द्वारा किए गए लगातार प्रयासों से कठिन कार्यों में भी अच्छी सफलता मिलेगी और आपके सभी निजी कार्यों की समय पर पूर्ति होगी। स्वास्थ्य के मोर्चे पर आज आपको थोड़ा सावधान रहने की जरूरत है; आज उदर विकार (पेट से संबंधित समस्याओं) आदि के कारण कुछ कष्ट हो सकता है।
मकर राशि (Capricorn)-सहज व्यवहार से विरोधियों पर विजय
मकर राशि के जातकों के लिए आज का दिन अपने आत्मविश्वास को दिखाने का है। आज आप अपने करियर और व्यापार में सफलता प्राप्त करने के लिए किसी भी प्रकार का बड़ा जोखिम उठाने के लिए पूरी तरह तैयार रहेंगे, और यह साहस आपको लाभ देगा।
आज आपके सहज, सरल और मधुर व्यवहार से आपके घोर विरोधी और शत्रु भी पूरी तरह प्रभावित हो जाएंगे और उनके विरोध की गति धीमी पड़ जाएगी। मानसिक रूप से आज आप पूरी तरह प्रसन्न और तनावमुक्त रहेंगे। समय की अनुकूलता के कारण आपके सभी सोचे हुए काम वक्त पर पूरे हो जाएंगे।
कुंभ राशि (Aquarius)-योजनाओं का फलीभूत होना
कुंभ राशि के जातकों को आज जल्दबाजी की आदत से पूरी तरह बचना होगा। आज दफ्तर या व्यापार में किसी भी काम को बहुत जल्द निपटाने के चक्कर में आप अपना कोई बड़ा आर्थिक या व्यावहारिक नुकसान कर बैठेंगे, इसलिए धैर्य से काम लें।
राहत की बात यह है कि आपकी पुरानी बनाई गई कोई महत्वपूर्ण योजना आज पूरी तरह फलीभूत होगी। समय की अनुकूलता से आज सोचे हुए कार्यों में अच्छी गति आएगी, जिससे रुका हुआ धन भी वापस मिल सकता है। आज पूरे दिन कामकाज में आपकी व्यस्तता काफी ज्यादा बढ़ी रहेगी।
मीन राशि (Pisces)-राजकीय मामलों में बड़ी विजय
मीन राशि के जातकों के लिए रविवार का दिन कानूनी और सरकारी मोर्चे पर बड़ी राहत लेकर आया है। काफी समय से अदालतों या सरकारी दफ्तरों में अटके हुए आपके राजकीय मामले आज बहुत ही आसानी से सुलझ जाएंगे, जिससे आपका मानसिक बोझ पूरी तरह हल्का होगा।
आज आप परिवार के साथ किसी बड़े धार्मिक कार्य या यात्रा में शामिल हो सकते हैं, जिससे मन शांत रहेगा। कार्यक्षेत्र में आज आपको अपने अधीनस्थ लोगों (Subordinates) और कर्मचारियों से पूरी अनुकूलता और सहयोग प्राप्त होगा। पूरे दिन आपका आत्मविश्वास और ऊर्जा का स्तर बहुत ऊंचा बना रहेगा।
व्यापार-भविष्य: आज का बाजार विश्लेषण और कमोडिटी ट्रेंड
आज शुद्ध ज्येष्ठ शुक्ल चतुर्दशी तिथि है और इस विशेष दिन पर आकाश मंडल में ज्येष्ठा नक्षत्र का प्रभाव रहने वाला है। ज्योतिषीय गणना और ग्रहों के गोचर के अनुसार, ज्येष्ठा नक्षत्र के इस विशिष्ट प्रभाव के कारण आज कमोडिटी बाजार, खाद्यान्न बाजार, वस्त्र उद्योग और सराफा बाजार में एक विशेष गिरावट (मंदी) का रुख देखने को मिलेगा।
व्यापारी वर्ग, स्टॉकिस्टों और निवेशकों के लिए आज का बाजार विश्लेषण और ग्रहों की समय अवधि के संकेत भविष्य की रणनीति बनाने के लिए अत्यंत महत्वपूर्ण हैं। आइए विस्तार से जानते हैं आज की व्यावसायिक भविष्यवाणियां:
सराफा और वस्त्र बाजार में मंदी (Bullion & Textile Market Trends)
ज्येष्ठा नक्षत्र के प्रभाव के चलते आज सराफा बाजार के निवेशकों और वस्त्र उद्योग से जुड़े व्यापारियों के लिए बाजार थोड़ा सुस्त रहने का संकेत दे रहा है। ज्योतिषीय गणना के अनुसार, आज सोने और चांदी के भाव में मंदी की चाल चलेगी। इसके साथ ही उनी वस्त्र, रूई और सूत (Yarn) के बाजार में भी आज कीमतों में गिरावट दर्ज की जा सकती है। जो लोग इन वस्तुओं की नई खरीदारी या लिवाली करना चाहते हैं, उनके लिए यह मंदी एक अच्छा अवसर साबित हो सकती है।
किराना और खाद्यान्न बाजार (Grocery Market Analysis)
अनाज और किराना बाजार की बात करें तो आज मीठे के बाजार में भी मंदी का स्पष्ट असर देखने को मिलेगा। ज्योतिषीय गणना के अनुसार, आज गुड़ और खांड (चीनी) के भाव में मंदी का रुख बना रहेगा, जिससे थोक बाजारों में कीमतों में कुछ कमी आ सकती है। स्टॉकिस्टों को आज बाजार की चाल को देखकर ही माल का उठाव करना चाहिए।
आज व्यापार करने का विशेष महामुहूर्त
आज ग्रहों की स्थिति व्यापारियों के लिए एक बहुत ही विशेष वित्तीय लाभ का योग बना रही है। ज्योतिषीय गणना के अनुसार, आज दोपहर 2 बजकर 12 मिनट से लेकर 2 बजकर 15 मिनट के रुख पर व्यापार करना अत्यंत लाभप्रद रहेगा। इस मात्र 3 मिनट की विशेष समय अवधि और इसके बाद बनने वाले बाजार के रुख को समझकर यदि कोई बड़ा सौदा या निवेश किया जाए, तो उसमें भारी मुनाफा मिलने की शत-प्रतिशत संभावना रहेगी।
ये भी पढ़ें :-   Aaj Ka Rashifal 27 June 2026: शनिवार को चमकेगी इन राशियों की किस्मत, जानें किन बातों का रखना होगा ध्यान
आज का विशेष भाग्यांक
आज के दिन सभी प्रकार के नए व्यापारिक समझौतों, बड़े वित्तीय सौदों, कमोडिटी मार्केट में निवेश या किसी भी महत्वपूर्ण कार्य की शुरुआत करते समय शुभ अंकों का विशेष ध्यान रखें। ज्योतिषीय गणना के अनुसार भाग्यांक 5406 आज आपके लिए अत्यंत शुभ, फलदायी और आर्थिक समृद्धि दिलाने वाला साबित होगा। इस अंक के प्रभाव से आपके व्यावसायिक निर्णयों में सटीकता आएगी।

title: The end of Putin’s regime will spring from war spending chaos, former central bank advisor says, amid military mutiny threat and fuel-shortage brawls
description: "It’s less dramatic than a palace coup, but this is what decline looks like."
content:
Vladimir Putin’s grip on power has remained resilient despite the economic woes caused by his invasion of Ukraine, but the seeds of an eventual decline may have already been planted, according to a former Russian central bank advisor.



A telltale sign is the Kremlin’s abandonment of any fiscal discipline as the costs of fighting the Ukraine war, which is now in its fifth year, strain existing resources. 



Alexandra Prokopenko, who is now a fellow at the Carnegie Russia Eurasia Center, pointed out in a recent Financial Times op-ed that the war has forced Russia to unwind its long-touted fiscal restraint.



In a striking example of the turnaround, Russia’s parliament recently gave the finance ministry a blank check to spend more and borrow past its debt ceiling without a formal budget or explicit legislative approval.



That’s as the budget deficit through May is already double 2025’s full-year level, hitting 2.6% of GDP, or about $83 billion. At the same time, Russia’s sovereign wealth fund, which has been tapped to cover budget shortfalls, is being rapidly depleted and just a fraction of prewar levels.



 “A cornered autocracy is rewriting the fiscal rules as it goes, cutting parliament out of the loop, and will not admit to dangers it cannot control,” Prokopenko wrote. “It’s less dramatic than a palace coup, but this is what decline looks like.”



The precipitous deterioration in Russia’s finances coincides with Ukraine’s stunning military successes this year. Advanced drones and new tactics have allowed Kyiv to not hold off the Russian military’s attacks but push them back and regain territory. Long-range drones are also reaching deep into Russia, including St. Petersburg and Moscow, targeting refineries and the defense industrial base. 



The result has been devastating battlefield casualties that now outpace the ability to raise fresh recruits as well as soaring death-benefit payouts and widespread fuel shortages across the country. 



Meanwhile, the Kremlin has been unable to defend against all of Ukraine’s drone attacks, forcing companies to spend more than $1 billion of their own money on makeshift protection. But Moscow also refuses to reimburse them. 



Putin’s “juggling act” has now come to an end as he can no longer fund his war, keep a lid on inflation, and continue growing the economy all at once, Prokopenko said.



“The war is increasingly paid for by quietly invoicing the population and suspending the state’s own rules,” she added. “A regime sustained this way is heading for a poorer, angrier country, a financial system out of control, and war funding it cannot count on. The end, when it comes, will spring from this kind of decline, the sort that begins long before anyone names it.”



For now, Putin’s grip on power is secure, but public discontent is growing as average citizens buckle under the pressure of high inflation and onerous interest rates.



Russia’s fuel shortage has added to the misery, creating long lines at gas stations with motorists waiting for hours to fill up. Frustration is boiling over, and fights are breaking out between people struggling to buy rationed supplies of gasoline.


Black smoke rises from the refinery where a fire broke out following a strike as firefighting efforts continue in Moscow, Russia on June 18, 2026. Sefa Karacan/Anadolu via Getty Images



In addition, the Russian military’s “meat-grinder” tactics in Ukraine, where troops suffer ruinous losses for barely any gain, are creating a backlash. 



In fact, the average life expectancy of a new recruit is about 10 days to three weeks, and once on the battlefield, their survival averages just 20-35 minutes, according to Russian military bloggers. 



One Russian blogger, who is a veteran the Ukraine war going by the name Aleksandr Lunin, posted a video on Thursday that went viral. In it, he described regular torture of soldiers by their own commanders, according to Radio Free Europe.



Lunin also demanded a live, on-air meeting with Putin and warned that if it did not take place soon, “the army will turn its weapons against the Kremlin.” He added that he was relaying the sentiment of active-duty military and security officials who met with him earlier. 



But he walked back the mutiny threat on Friday, explaining that if soldiers wanted to rebel, they would do it quietly and not ask him to issue a warning for them



Still, the original video was so widespread that Putin’s spokesman was asked to comment on it, and said the Kremlin was aware “that such an appeal exists.”



Peter Frankopan, a professor of global history at the University of Oxford, cautioned in a Foreign Policy article that a revolution in Russia is not likely.



Instead, continued economic pain and disenchantment over the war will convince certain factions in the regime “that it is time for a new start,” he said, adding that “today’s cracks can become tomorrow’s fissures.”



But that could also make Putin more dangerous as fights to cling to power, raising the risk of escalation in Ukraine or other parts of Europe.



“Beware the drowning man: The coming months will likely be dangerous outside and inside Russia as Putin tries desperately to stay afloat,” Frankopan warned.
This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: 'It means so much' - Ireland Women end wait for World Cup win

title: राम मंदिर चढ़ावा विवाद पर बोले अखिलेश यादव, आस्था के साथ हुआ खिलवाड़
description: समाजवादी पार्टी के राष्ट्रीय अध्यक्ष अखिलेश यादव ने अयोध्या में राम मंदिर के दानपात्र से जुड़े कथित घोटाले, कानून व्यवस्था और उत्तर प्रदेश सरकार के कामकाज को लेकर भाजपा पर निशाना साधा।
content:
लखनऊ। समाजवादी पार्टी के राष्ट्रीय अध्यक्ष अखिलेश यादव ने अयोध्या में राम मंदिर के दानपात्र से जुड़े कथित घोटाले, कानून व्यवस्था और उत्तर प्रदेश सरकार के कामकाज को लेकर भाजपा पर निशाना साधा।  
उन्होंने पत्रकारों से बातचीत में कहा कि जनता के दबाव में सरकार को विशेष जांच दल (एसआईटी) का गठन करना पड़ा, लेकिन अब सबसे बड़ा सवाल यह है कि एसआईटी की रिपोर्ट किसे सौंपी गई और उस रिपोर्ट के आधार पर क्या कार्रवाई की गई। 
अखिलेश यादव ने कहा कि अयोध्या से जुड़ी घटना बेहद दुखद है और इससे पूरे देश के लोगों की धार्मिक भावनाएं आहत हुई हैं। उन्होंने आरोप लगाया कि भाजपा पहले कहती थी कि देश खतरे में है, लेकिन अब स्थिति ऐसी हो गई है कि लोगों को भगवान की सुरक्षा की चिंता होने लगी है। सरकार के लिए आस्था से ज्यादा पैसा महत्वपूर्ण हो गया है और यही वजह है कि धार्मिक स्थलों से जुड़े मामलों में भी लगातार विवाद सामने आ रहे हैं। 
उन्होंने कहा कि मुख्यमंत्री लगातार अयोध्या के दौरे करते रहे और वहां विकास के बड़े-बड़े दावे किए गए, लेकिन यदि उन्हें वहां हो रहे कथित भ्रष्टाचार और अनियमितताओं की जानकारी नहीं थी तो यह सरकार की बड़ी विफलता है। अखिलेश ने आरोप लगाया कि मामले में गिरफ्तार लोगों के पास से बड़ी मात्रा में नकदी और अन्य कीमती सामान मिलने की खबरें सामने आई हैं। उन्होंने कहा कि श्रद्धालुओं द्वारा भगवान के नाम पर दिया गया दान पूरी आस्था के साथ दिया जाता है और यदि उसमें किसी तरह की गड़बड़ी हुई है तो यह बेहद गंभीर मामला है। उन्होंने कहा कि भगवान राम ऐसे लोगों को कभी माफ नहीं करेंगे जो श्रद्धालुओं की आस्था के साथ खिलवाड़ करते हैं। 
सपा प्रमुख ने कहा कि सरकार खुद मान रही है कि सीसीटीवी फुटेज के आधार पर जांच की जा रही है, लेकिन इतने लंबे समय तक फुटेज देखने के बाद भी पूरी सच्चाई सामने नहीं आ सकी। उन्होंने कहा कि सरकार को इस मामले की निष्पक्ष जांच कर दोषियों के खिलाफ सख्त कार्रवाई करनी चाहिए। 
अखिलेश यादव ने उत्तर प्रदेश की कानून व्यवस्था पर भी सवाल उठाए। उन्होंने कहा कि प्रदेश में फर्जी एनकाउंटर की शिकायतें लगातार सामने आती रही हैं और कई मामलों में पीड़ित परिवार सरकार की कार्रवाई से संतुष्ट नहीं हैं। उनका कहना था कि यदि पीड़ित परिवारों को न्याय नहीं मिलेगा तो सरकार पर जनता का भरोसा कमजोर होगा। उन्होंने कहा कि पुलिस अधिकारियों को भी कानून के दायरे में रहकर काम करना चाहिए और किसी निर्दोष के साथ अन्याय नहीं होना चाहिए। 
उन्होंने भाजपा पर लोकतांत्रिक संस्थाओं को कमजोर करने का आरोप भी लगाया। अखिलेश ने कहा कि भाजपा विपक्ष की राजनीतिक ताकत को खत्म करने की कोशिश कर रही है और अपने राजनीतिक हितों के लिए सरकारी एजेंसियों का इस्तेमाल कर रही है। उन्होंने दावा किया कि यदि भाजपा दोबारा सत्ता में आती है तो लोकतंत्र और चुनावी व्यवस्था पर गंभीर असर पड़ सकता है। 
शिक्षा और रोजगार के मुद्दे पर सपा अध्यक्ष ने कहा कि प्रदेश की शिक्षा व्यवस्था लगातार कमजोर होती जा रही है। उन्होंने पेपर लीक की घटनाओं का जिक्र करते हुए कहा कि इससे युवाओं का भविष्य प्रभावित हो रहा है। उन्होंने कहा कि आज इंटरनेट, सोशल मीडिया और आर्टिफिशियल इंटेलिजेंस के दौर में शिक्षा व्यवस्था को आधुनिक बनाने की जरूरत है। पॉलिटेक्निक, आईटीआई और इंजीनियरिंग कॉलेजों में ऐसी ट्रेनिंग दी जानी चाहिए, जिससे युवाओं को रोजगार के बेहतर अवसर मिल सकें। 
उन्होंने कहा कि यदि समाजवादी पार्टी की सरकार बनती है तो प्राथमिक शिक्षा से लेकर उच्च शिक्षा तक व्यापक सुधार किए जाएंगे। शिक्षकों के प्रशिक्षण, तकनीकी शिक्षा और डिजिटल सुविधाओं पर विशेष ध्यान दिया जाएगा, ताकि युवाओं को बदलती दुनिया के अनुरूप तैयार किया जा सके। 
किसानों के मुद्दे पर अखिलेश यादव ने कहा कि समय पर बीज और खाद उपलब्ध कराना, फसलों का उचित मूल्य दिलाना और कृषि उत्पादों के लिए आधुनिक बाजार विकसित करना उनकी प्राथमिकता होगी। उन्होंने डेयरी क्षेत्र को खेती से जोड़कर किसानों की आय बढ़ाने की भी बात कही। 
अयोध्या के विकास पर बोलते हुए उन्होंने कहा कि शहर का विकास केवल इमारतें बनाने तक सीमित नहीं होना चाहिए, बल्कि वहां रहने वाले लोगों की सुविधाओं और धार्मिक आस्था का भी पूरा ध्यान रखा जाना चाहिए। उन्होंने कहा कि समाजवादी पार्टी ऐसी अयोध्या बनाना चाहती है, जहां आधुनिक सुविधाओं के साथ धार्मिक और सांस्कृतिक पहचान भी सुरक्षित रहे। 
अखिलेश यादव ने कहा कि समाजवादी पार्टी सामाजिक न्याय और पीडीए (पिछड़ा, दलित और अल्पसंख्यक) के एजेंडे को आगे बढ़ाते हुए वर्ष 2027 के विधानसभा चुनाव की तैयारी कर रही है। उन्होंने दावा किया कि जनता बदलाव चाहती है और आने वाले चुनाव में प्रदेश की राजनीति में बड़ा परिवर्तन देखने को मिलेगा।

title: ഇറാന്റെ കപ്പലാക്രമണത്തിന് തിരിച്ചടിയുമായി അമേരിക്ക, പശ്ചിമേഷ്യയിൽ വീണ്ടും സംഘർഷം രൂക്ഷം; ഗൾഫിലേക്ക് വിമാന സർവീസ് പുനരാരംഭിക്കാൻ ഇറാന്‍റെ നീക്കം
description: ഹോർമൂസിൽ ഇറാൻ നടത്തിയ കപ്പലാക്രമണത്തിന് പിന്നാലെ പശ്ചിമേഷ്യയിൽ സംഘർഷം രൂക്ഷമായി. ഇറാന്റെ സൈനിക കേന്ദ്രങ്ങളിൽ അമേരിക്ക പ്രത്യാക്രമണം നടത്തിയപ്പോൾ, ബഹ്റൈനിൽ ഡ്രോണാക്രമണം നടത്തി ഇറാൻ തിരിച്ചടിച്ചു. ഈ സംഭവവികാസങ്ങൾ മേഖലയിൽ വീണ്ടും അശാന്തി പടർത്തുകയാണ്
content: <p>ടെഹ്റാൻ: പശ്ചിമേഷ്യയിൽ പത്ത് ദിവസത്തെ ഇടവേളയ്ക്ക് ശേഷം വീണ്ടും സംഘർഷം രൂക്ഷമാകുന്നു. ഹോർമൂസിൽ കപ്പലാക്രമിച്ച് ഇറാൻ തുടക്കമിട്ട സംഘർഷം വ്യാപിക്കുകയാണ്. ഇറാന്റെ ഡ്രോൺ, മിസൈൽ കേന്ദ്രങ്ങളിൽ അമേരിക്ക പ്രത്യാക്രമണം നടത്തി. ആക്രമണത്തിന് തിരിച്ചടിയായി ബഹ്റൈനിലും ഇറാന്റെ ഡ്രോണാക്രമണമുണ്ടായി. അതിനിടെ ഹോർമൂസിൽ വീണ്ടും കപ്പലാക്രമിക്കപ്പെട്ടതും സംഘർഷം രൂക്ഷമാക്കുകയാണ്. ഹോർമൂസിൽ ഒമാൻ പിന്തുണയോടെ യു എൻ ഏജൻസി തുറന്ന സുരക്ഷിത നാവിക ഇടനാഴിയാണ് പ്രകോപനങ്ങളുടെ തുടക്കം. സുരക്ഷിത നാവിക ഇടനാഴി അടയക്കാൻ ഇറാൻ എം വി എവർ ലൈലി എന്ന കപ്പലാക്രമിച്ചതോടെയാണ് പശ്ചിമേഷ്യയിൽ വീണ്ടും അശാന്തി പടരാൻ കാരണമായത്.</p><h2><strong>അമേരിക്കയുടെ തിരിച്ചടി</strong></h2><p>സമാധാന ധാരണ ലംഘിച്ചതോടെ തീരത്തോട് ചേർന്ന ഇറാന്റെ ഡ്രോൺ, മിസൈൽ, റഡാർ കേന്ദ്രങ്ങളിൽ അമേരിക്ക ശക്തമായ വ്യോമാക്രമണമാണ് നടത്തിയത്. ഇറാൻ തിരിച്ചടിച്ചത് ബഹ്റൈനിലാണെന്നത് വ്യക്തമാക്കുന്നതായിരുന്നു ബഹ്റൈന്‍റെ പ്രസ്താവന. ബഹ്റൈനിൽ ഡ്രോണാക്രമണം ഉണ്ടായതും, അപലപിച്ചുള്ള പ്രസ്താവനയും ബഹറൈൻ പുറത്തിറക്കി. ഒമാൻ തീരത്തിന് സമീപം ഇന്ന് വീണ്ടും ഇന്ധന ടാങ്കർ ആക്രമിക്കപ്പെട്ടു. ഹോർമൂസിലെ നിയന്ത്രണം കൈപ്പിടിയിൽ നിർത്താൻ ഇറാൻ തുടക്കമിട്ട ആക്രമണം പടരുന്നുവെന്ന് ചുരുക്കം. വെള്ളിയാഴ്ച ഒപ്പിട്ട ലബനൻ - ഇസ്രയേൽ സമാധാന കരാറും പുതിയ തർക്കത്തിന് തുടക്കമിട്ടേക്കും. തങ്ങളുടെ നിരായുധീകരണത്തിന് വഴിയൊരുക്കുന്ന കരാർ ഹിസ്ബുള്ള തള്ളി. സുരക്ഷാ മേഖലകളിൽ നിന്ന് പിന്മാറില്ലെന്ന് ഇസ്രയേലും വ്യക്തമാക്കി. ലബനൻ പരമാധികാരം പണയ വെച്ച കരാറെന്ന വിമർശനവുമായി തെരുവിലും പ്രതിഷേധമുണ്ട്.</p><h2><strong>ഗൾഫിലേക്ക് വിമാന സർവീസ് പുനരാരംഭിക്കാൻ ഇറാൻ</strong></h2><p>അതേസമയം ഗൾഫ് ഉൾപ്പടെ അയൽ രാജ്യങ്ങളുമായുള്ള വിമാന സർവീസ് പുനരാരംഭിക്കുന്നു എന്ന് ഇറാൻ വ്യക്തമാക്കി. യു എ ഇയിലേക്ക് വിമാന സർവീസുകൾ ഈ ആഴ്ചയിൽ പുനരാരംഭിക്കും എന്നാണ് ഇറാൻ അവകാശപ്പെട്ടത്. സമാനമായി മറ്റ് ഗൾഫ് സർവീസുകളും തുടങ്ങാൻ ആണ് ശ്രമം എന്നും ഇറാൻ ന്യൂസ്‌ ഏജൻസി റിപ്പോർട്ട് ചെയ്തു. യു എ ഇയിലെ ജബൽ അലി പോർട്ട് വഴി ചരക്കു നീക്കവും പുനരാരംഭിക്കും എന്ന് ഇറാൻ മാധ്യമങ്ങൾ റിപ്പോർട്ട് ചെയ്തു. ഇറാന്റെ 300 ബില്യൻ ഫണ്ട് ലഭിക്കാൻ ഗൾഫ് രാജ്യങ്ങളുമായി ബന്ധം പുനസ്ഥാപിക്കൽ അനിവാര്യമാണ്.</p><p></p>

title: ആരതിയുടെ ആത്മഹത്യ: ഭർത്താവ് അതുലിനെതിരെ തെളിവുകൾ ലഭിച്ചു, അറസ്റ്റ് ചെയ്യും; ഗാർഹിക പീഡനത്തിനും ആത്മഹത്യാപ്രേരണയ്ക്കും കേസെടുക്കും
description: തിരുവനന്തപുരം ആറ്റുകാലിൽ 27 കാരിയായ ആരതി ആത്മഹത്യ ചെയ്ത സംഭവത്തിൽ ഭർത്താവ് അതുലിനെതിരെ ഗാർഹിക പീഡനത്തിനും ആത്മഹത്യാപ്രേരണയ്ക്കും തെളിവുകൾ ലഭിച്ചു. പൊലീസ് കസ്റ്റഡിയിലെടുത്ത അതുലിന്റെ അറസ്റ്റ് ഉടൻ രേഖപ്പെടുത്തുമെന്ന് അറിയിച്ചു. ആരതിയുടെ ശരീരത്തിൽ മർദ്ദനമേറ്റ പാടുകളും ആത്മഹത്യാക്കുറിപ്പും പൊലീസ് കണ്ടെടുത്തിട്ടുണ്ട്
content: <p>തിരുവനന്തപുരം: തിരുവനന്തപുരം ആറ്റുകാലിൽ 27 കാരിയായ ആരതി ആത്മഹത്യ ചെയ്ത സംഭവത്തില്‍ ഭർത്താവ് അതുലിനെ അറസ്റ്റ് ചെയ്യാൻ തീരുമാനിച്ച് പൊലീസ്. രാവിലെ കസ്റ്റഡിയിലെടുത്ത അതുലിനെ വിശദമായി ചോദ്യം ചെയ്തതിന് പിന്നാലെയാണ് അറസ്റ്റ് രേഖപ്പെടുത്താൻ തീരുമാനിച്ചത്. ഗാർഹിക പീഡന വകുപ്പ് ചുമത്താനുള്ള തെളിവുകൾ ലഭിച്ചതായി പൊലീസ് അറിയിച്ചു. അതുലിനെതിരെ ആത്മഹത്യാപ്രേരണ, ഗാർഹിക പീഡന നിരോധന നിയമം എന്നീ വകുപ്പുകൾ പ്രകാരം കേസെടുക്കുമെന്നും പൊലീസ് വ്യക്തമാക്കി. ആരതിയുടെ ശരീരത്തിൽ മർദ്ദനത്തിന്റെ നിരവധി പാടുകൾ കണ്ടെത്തിയിട്ടുണ്ട്. വർക്കല സ്വദേശി ആരതി ആറ്റുകാലിലെ വാടകവീട്ടിലാണ് തൂങ്ങിമരിച്ചത്. ഭർത്താവ് അതുൽ മർദ്ദിച്ചത് അമ്മയെ വിളിച്ച് പറഞ്ഞതിന് ശേഷമായിരുന്നു ആരതി ജീവനൊടുക്കിയത്. അതുലിന്റെ പീഡനം കാരണമാണ് ആരതി ആത്മഹത്യ ചെയ്തതെന്ന് യുവതിയുടെ കുടുംബം ആരോപിച്ചിരുന്നു. അതുൽ മർദ്ദിച്ചതിന്റെ ചിത്രങ്ങളടക്കം പുറത്തുവന്നിട്ടുണ്ട്. ഒന്നരവർഷം മുമ്പാണ് വർക്കല സ്വദേശി ആരതിയും കല്ലറ സ്വദേശി അതുലും വിവാഹം കഴിച്ചത്. ആറ് മാസം മുമ്പാണ് ഇവര്‍ ആറ്റുകാലിലെ വാടക വീട്ടിലേക്ക് മാറിയത്. വിവാഹം കഴിഞ്ഞ് മൂന്ന് മാസത്തിനുള്ളിൽ പലകാരങ്ങൾ പറഞ്ഞ് അതുൽ ആരതിയെ ഉപദ്രവിച്ചിരുന്നെന്ന് കുടുംബം പറയുന്നു.</p><h2><strong>അതുലിനെതിരെ ആരതിയുടെ കുടുംബം</strong></h2><p>ആരതി ജീവനൊടുക്കിയത് ഭർത്താവിന്റെ പീഡനം കാരണമെന്ന് കുടുംബം പൊലീസിൽ പരാതി നൽകിയിട്ടുണ്ട്. ഒന്നരവർഷം മുമ്പായിരുന്നു ഇവരുടെ വിവാഹം നടന്നത്. ആറ് മാസം മുമ്പാണ് ആറ്റുകാലിലെ വാടകവീട്ടിലേക്ക് മാറിയത്. വിവാഹം കഴിഞ്ഞ് മൂന്ന് മാസത്തിനുള്ളിൽ പലകാരണങ്ങൾ പറഞ്ഞ് അതുൽ, ആരതിയെ ഉപദ്രവിച്ചിരുന്നെന്ന് കുടുംബം പറയുന്നു. ആരതിയുടെ അമ്പത് പവൻ സ്വർണം പണയംവെച്ചു. പണത്തിന്റെ പേരിലും സ്വർണത്തിന്റെ പേരിലും ഉപദ്രവിച്ചിരുന്നെന്നും അതുലിന് മറ്റ് ബന്ധങ്ങൾ ഉണ്ടായിരുന്നെന്നും ആരതിയുടെ ബന്ധുക്കൾ പറയുന്നു. അതുലിന്റെ മർദനത്തിൽ മുറിവേറ്റതിന്റെ ചിത്രങ്ങൾ അമ്മയ്ക്ക് ആരതി അയച്ച് നൽകിയിരുന്നു. ഇന്നലെ വഴക്കുണ്ടായതിന് പിന്നാലെ ആരതി മുറിയിൽ കയറി വാതിലടച്ചു. ആരതി ആത്മഹത്യ ചെയ്തെന്ന് മനസിലാക്കിയ അതുൽ സുഹൃത്തുക്കളെ വിളിച്ചുവരുത്തിയതിന് ശേഷമാണ് വാതിൽ തുറന്നത്. മരണത്തിന് മുമ്പ് ആരതി അമ്മയെ വിളിച്ചിരുന്നു. ആത്മഹത്യക്കുറിപ്പുകളും ഡയറിയും പൊലീസ് കണ്ടെടുത്തിട്ടുണ്ട്. ആരതിയുടെ ശരീരത്തിൽ മർദ്ദനമേറ്റതിന്റെ നിരവധി പാടുകളും കണ്ടെത്തി. അതുലിനെതിരെ ആത്മഹത്യാപ്രേരണ, ഗാർഹിക പീഡന നിരോധന നിയമം എന്നീ വകുപ്പുകൾ പ്രകാരം കേസെടുക്കാനാണ് പൊലീസിന്‍റെ തീരുമാനം.</p><p><strong>(ആത്മഹത്യ ഒന്നിനും പരിഹാരമല്ല. അതിജീവിക്കാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുക. മാനസികാരോഗ്യ വിദഗ്ധരുടെ സഹായം തേടുക. അത്തരം ചിന്തകളുളളപ്പോൾ 'ദിശ' ഹെൽപ് ലൈനിൽ വിളിക്കുക. ടോൾ ഫ്രീ നമ്പർ: Toll free helpline number: 1056, 0471-2552056)</strong></p><p></p>

title: ‘Perfume is chemistry’: Why your favourite scent smells different on someone else
Weekly Horoscope 2026 June 28 to July 04: ଜାଣନ୍ତୁ ଏ ସପ୍ତାହର ରାଶିଫଳ
description:
ମେଷ- ରବିବାର କ୍ରୋଧ ଉପରେ ନିୟନ୍ତ୍ରଣ ରଖନ୍ତୁ। ସୋମ, ମଙ୍ଗଳ ଓ ବୁଧବାର ବିଶେଷ କାମରେ ଅନ୍ୟମାନଙ୍କର ସହଯୋଗ ପାଇବେ। ଗୁରୁ ଓ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଆର୍ଥିକ ସମସ୍ୟାର ସମାଧାନ ହେବ। ଶନିବାର କିଛି ଆଶା ପୂରଣ ହେବ।
ବୃଷ- ରବିବାର ପ୍ରେମ ଜୀବନ ମଧୁର ହେବ। ସୋମ, ମଙ୍ଗଳ ଓ ବୁଧବାର ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀ ପରୀକ୍ଷାରେ ଭଲ ପରିଣାମ ପାଇବେ। ଗୁରୁ ଓ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ସମ୍ମାନୀୟ ଲୋକଙ୍କ ସହିତ ମିଶିବେ। ଶନିବାର ବେପାରରେ ଉନ୍ନତି ହେବ।
ମିଥୁନ- ରବିବାର ଆର୍ଥିକ ସଫଳତା ପାଇବେ। ସୋମ, ମଙ୍ଗଳ ଓ ବୁଧବାର ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ସ୍ଥିତିରେ ଖୁସି ରହିବେ। ଗୁରୁ ଓ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ପୂର୍ବ କଥାକୁ ନେଇ ମନସ୍ତାପରେ ରହିପାରନ୍ତି। ଶନିବାର ଭାଗ୍ୟୋନ୍ନତି ହେବ।
କର୍କଟ- ରବିବାର ବ୍ୟବସାୟ ଲାଗି ନୂଆ ସୁଯୋଗ ପାଇବେ। ସୋମ, ମଙ୍ଗଳ ଓ ବୁଧବାର ବଡ଼ କଂପାନିରେ ଚାକିରି ଲାଗି ଡାକରା ଆସିବ। ଗୁରୁ ଓ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଅଚାନକ ଧନଲାଭ ହେବ। ଶନିବାର ପ୍ରିୟଜନଙ୍କ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ ପାଇବେ।
ସିଂହ- ରବିବାର ଉନ୍ନତିର ପଥ ଖୋଲିବ। ସୋମ, ମଙ୍ଗଳ ଓ ବୁଧବାର ଦାମ୍ପତ୍ୟ ଜୀବନରେ ନୂତନତ୍ବ ଆସିବ। ଗୁରୁ ଓ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଜୀବନରେ ଆଗକୁ ବଢ଼ିବାର ସୁଯୋଗ ପାଇବେ। ଶନିବାର ଶରୀର ସୁସ୍ଥ ଓ ମନ ପ୍ରସନ୍ନ ରହିବ।
କନ୍ୟା- ରବିବାର ପରିଶ୍ରମ ବଳରେ ସଫଳତା ପାଇବେ। ସୋମ, ମଙ୍ଗଳ ଓ ବୁଧବାର ସରକାରୀ କାମ ପୂରା ହୋଇଯିବ। ଗୁରୁ ଓ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ବେପାରରେ ଯଥେଷ୍ଟ ଲାଭ ପାଇବେ। ଶନିବାର ବନ୍ଧୁ ସହ ମଉଜମସ୍ତି କରିବେ।
ଆହୁରି ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ- Ebola Cases: କଙ୍ଗୋରେ ଭୟଙ୍କର ରୂପ ନେଉଛି ‘ଇବୋଲା’: ସଂକ୍ରମିତଙ୍କ ସଂଖ୍ୟା ୧୨୦୦ ଅତିକ୍ରମ କଲା
ତୁଳା- ରବିବାର ବଡ଼ ଦାୟିତ୍ବ କାନ୍ଧକୁ ଆସିବ। ସୋମ, ମଙ୍ଗଳ ଓ ବୁଧବାର ସହଯୋଗୀଙ୍କ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ ପାଇବେ। ଗୁରୁ ଓ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ନିଜକୁ ଶକ୍ତିମାନ୍‌ ଅନୁଭବ କରିବେ। ଶନିବାର ପ୍ରେମ ଜୀବନ ଭଲ ହେବ।
ବିଛା- ରବିବାର ଘରେ ସୁଖ ସମୃଦ୍ଧି ବୃଦ୍ଧି ହେବ। ସୋମ, ମଙ୍ଗଳ ଓ ବୁଧବାର କିଛି ନୂଆ ଅନୁଭବ ପ୍ରାପ୍ତ କରିବେ। ଗୁରୁ ଓ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଅଫିସ୍‌ରେ ବାକିଥିବା କାମ ପୂରା କରିପାରିବେ। ଶନିବାର ଲୋକମାନଙ୍କ ବିଶ୍ବାସ ଜିଣିବେ।
ଧନୁ- ରବିବାର ଭାବିଚିନ୍ତି ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚ କରନ୍ତୁ। ସୋମ, ମଙ୍ଗଳ ଓ ବୁଧବାର ରଚନାତ୍ମକ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟରେ ଖ୍ୟାତି ବଢ଼ିବ। ଗୁରୁ ଓ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ପାରିବାରିକ ବାତାବରଣ ଶାନ୍ତିଦାୟକ ରହିବ। ଶନିବାର ବ୍ୟବସାୟରେ ଉନ୍ନତି ହେବ।
ମକର- ରବିବାର ପାରିବାରିକ ଜୀବନ ସୁଖଦ ରହିବ। ସୋମ, ମଙ୍ଗଳ ଓ ବୁଧବାର ବନ୍ଧୁମାନଙ୍କଠାରୁ ପୂରା ସହଯୋଗ ପାଇବେ। ଗୁରୁ ଓ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ସମାଜରେ ମାନ ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠା ବଢ଼ିବ। ଶନିବାର ଧାର ଦେଇଥିବା ପଇସା ପାଇବେ।
କୁମ୍ଭ- ରବିବାର ବନ୍ଧୁ ସହ କଥା ହୋଇ ଭଲ ଲାଗିବ। ସୋମ, ମଙ୍ଗଳ ଓ ବୁଧବାର ବାକ୍‌-ଚାତୁରିରେ ଲୋକମାନଙ୍କୁ ପ୍ରଭାବିତ କରିବେ। ଗୁରୁ ଓ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚ କମ୍ କରନ୍ତୁ। ଶନିବାର ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟରେ ସୁଧାର ହେବ।
ମୀନ- ରବିବାର ଧର୍ମକାର୍ଯ୍ୟରେ ମନ ଲାଗିବ। ସୋମ, ମଙ୍ଗଳ ଓ ବୁଧବାର ସବୁ କାମ ମନ ମୁତାବକ ପୂରା ହେବ। ଗୁରୁ ଓ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଆର୍ଥିକ ସ୍ଥିତିରେ ସ୍ଥିରତା ବଜାୟ ରହିବ। ଶନିବାର ଘରର ପରିବେଶ ଭଲ ରହିବ।
